## Entry 244
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:28:53.886Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:28:53.886Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_BKGypOuaP8hCk0kR87e5SLbz",
    "output": "Chunk ID: a84233\nWall time: 0.0515 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1068\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.identity.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.api.dto.request.UserSettingsUpsertRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.api.dto.response.UserSettingsResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.domain.PreferenceOption;\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.domain.User;\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.domain.UserSettings;\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.domain.enums.PreferenceOptionType;\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.exception.UserNotFoundException;\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.mapper.UserSettingsMapper;\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.repository.PreferenceOptionRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.repository.UserRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.repository.UserSettingsRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.ValidationException;\nimport java.util.LinkedHashSet;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Set;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class UserSettingsService {\n\n    private final UserSettingsRepository userSettingsRepository;\n    private final UserRepository userRepository;\n    private final PreferenceOptionRepository preferenceOptionRepository;\n    private final UserSettingsMapper userSettingsMapper;\n\n    public UserSettingsService(\n        UserSettingsRepository userSettingsRepository,\n        UserRepository userRepository,\n        PreferenceOptionRepository preferenceOptionRepository,\n        UserSettingsMapper userSettingsMapper\n    ) {\n        this.userSettingsRepository = userSettingsRepository;\n        this.userRepository = userRepository;\n        this.preferenceOptionRepository = preferenceOptionRepository;\n        this.userSettingsMapper = userSettingsMapper;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public UserSettingsResponse getMySettings(Long userId) {\n        UserSettings settings = userSettingsRepository.findWithPreferencesByUserId(userId)\n            .orElseGet(() -> new UserSettings(getUserOrThrow(userId)));\n        return userSettingsMapper.toResponse(settings);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public UserSettingsResponse upsertMySettings(Long userId, UserSettingsUpsertRequest request) {\n        validateGenres(request.preferredGenreOptionIds());\n\n        User user = getUserOrThrow(userId);\n        UserSettings settings = userSettingsRepository.findWithPreferencesByUserId(userId)\n            .orElseGet(() -> new UserSettings(user));\n\n        PreferenceOption cityOption = preferenceOptionRepository\n            .findByIdAndTypeAndActiveTrue(request.preferredCityOptionId(), PreferenceOptionType.CITY)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new ValidationException(\"Invalid preference\", \"INVALID_PREFERENCE\"));\n\n        Set<Long> genreIds = new LinkedHashSet<>(request.preferredGenreOptionIds());\n        List<PreferenceOption> genreOptions = preferenceOptionRepository\n            .findByIdInAndTypeAndActiveTrue(genreIds, PreferenceOptionType.GENRE);\n\n        if (genreOptions.size() != genreIds.size()) {\n            throw new ValidationException(\"Invalid preference\", \"INVALID_PREFERENCE\");\n        }\n\n        settings.updateProfile(\n            request.fullName(),\n            request.phone(),\n            request.dob(),\n            request.address(),\n            cityOption,\n            request.notificationOptIn()\n        );\n        settings.replaceGenrePreferences(genreOptions);\n\n        UserSettings saved = userSettingsRepository.save(settings);\n        return userSettingsMapper.toResponse(saved);\n    }\n\n    private void validateGenres(List<Long> genreOptionIds) {\n        if (genreOptionIds == null) {\n            throw new ValidationException(\"Invalid preference\", \"INVALID_PREFERENCE\");\n        }\n        if (genreOptionIds.size() > 3) {\n            throw new ValidationException(\"Invalid preference\", \"INVALID_PREFERENCE\");\n        }\n\n        Set<Long> uniqueIds = new LinkedHashSet<>(genreOptionIds);\n        if (uniqueIds.size() != genreOptionIds.size()) {\n            throw new ValidationException(\"Invalid preference\", \"INVALID_PREFERENCE\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    private User getUserOrThrow(Long userId) {\n        return userRepository.findById(userId).orElseThrow(() -> new UserNotFoundException(userId));\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

UserSettingsRepository userSettingsRepository;\n    private final UserRepository userRepository;\n    private final PreferenceOptionRepository preferenceOptionRepository;\n    private final UserSettingsMapper userSettingsMapper;\n\n    public UserSettingsService(\n        UserSettingsRepository userSettingsRepository,\n        UserRepository userRepository,\n        PreferenceOptionRepository preferenceOptionRepository,\n        UserSettingsMapper userSettingsMapper\n    ) {\n        this.userSettingsRepository = userSettingsRepository;\n        this.userRepository = userRepository;\n        this.preferenceOptionRepository = preferenceOptionRepository;\n        this.userSettingsMapper = userSettingsMapper;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public UserSettingsResponse getMySettings(Long userId) {\n        UserSettings settings = userSettingsRepository.findWithPreferencesByUserId(userId)\n            .orElseGet(() -> new UserSettings(getUserOrThrow(userId)));\n        return userSettingsMapper.toResponse(settings);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public UserSettingsResponse upsertMySettings(Long userId, UserSettingsUpsertRequest request) {\n        validateGenres(request.preferredGenreOptionIds());\n\n        User user = getUserOrThrow(userId);\n        UserSettings settings = userSettingsRepository.findWithPreferencesByUserId(userId)\n            .orElseGet(() -> new UserSettings(user));\n\n        PreferenceOption cityOption = preferenceOptionRepository\n            .findByIdAndTypeAndActiveTrue(request.preferredCityOptionId(), PreferenceOptionType.CITY)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new ValidationException(\"Invalid preference\", \"INVALID_PREFERENCE\"));\n\n        Set<Long> genreIds = new LinkedHashSet<>(request.preferredGenreOptionIds());\n        List<PreferenceOption> genreOptions = preferenceOptionRepository\n            .findByIdInAndTypeAndActiveTrue(genreIds, PreferenceOptionType.GENRE);\n\n        if (genreOptions.size() != genreIds.size()) {\n            throw new ValidationException(\"Invalid preference\", \"INVALID_PREFERENCE\");\n        }\n\n        settings.updateProfile(\n            request.fullName(),\n            request.phone(),\n            request.dob(),\n            request.address(),\n            cityOption,\n            request.notificationOptIn()\n        );\n        settings.replaceGenrePreferences(genreOptions);\n\n        UserSettings saved = userSettingsRepository.save(settings);\n        return userSettingsMapper.toResponse(saved);\n    }\n\n    private void validateGenres(List<Long> genreOptionIds) {\n        if (genreOptionIds == null) {\n            throw new ValidationException(\"Invalid preference\", \"INVALID_PREFERENCE\");\n        }\n        if (genreOptionIds.size() > 3) {\n            throw new ValidationException(\"Invalid preference\", \"INVALID_PREFERENCE\");\n        }\n\n        Set<Long> uniqueIds = new LinkedHashSet<>(genreOptionIds);\n        if (uniqueIds.size() != genreOptionIds.size()) {\n            throw new ValidationException(\"Invalid preference\", \"INVALID_PREFERENCE\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    private User getUserOrThrow(Long userId) {\n        return userRepository.findById(userId).orElseThrow(() -> new UserNotFoundException(userId));\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;\nimport org.springframework.security.core.Authentication;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\n\n@RestController\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/v1/bookings\")\npublic class BookingController {\n\n    private final BookingService bookingService;\n    private final CancellationService cancellationService;\n\n    public BookingController(BookingService bookingService, CancellationService cancellationService) {\n        this.bookingService = bookingService;\n        this.cancellationService = cancellationService;\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.USER + \"')\")\n    public Page<BookingSummaryResponse> listBookings(\n        Authentication authentication,\n        @PageableDefault(size = 10) Pageable pageable\n    ) {\n        AuthenticatedUser user = (AuthenticatedUser) ## Entry 320

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:29:55.519Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_enixD5KMaUu8IRpOHsrWjRUD",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 4e60cf\nWall time: 0.0505 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 229\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.promotions.event.listener;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.promotions.service.CouponRedemptionService;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.BookingConfirmedEvent;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.event.TransactionPhase;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.event.TransactionalEventListener;\n\n@Component\npublic class BookingConfirmedListener {\n\n    private final CouponRedemptionService couponRedemptionService;\n\n    public BookingConfirmedListener(CouponRedemptionService couponRedemptionService) {\n        this.couponRedemptionService = couponRedemptionService;\n    }\n\n    @TransactionalEventListener(phase = TransactionPhase.AFTER_COMMIT)\n    public void onBookingConfirmed(BookingConfirmedEvent event) {\n        couponRedemptionService.onBookingConfirmed(event.bookingId(), event.cartId(), event.userId());\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

{

  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_Npe9CRpSUnsobehqM64DebAX",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 3d50a6\nWall time: 0.0550 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 249\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.config;\n\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpHeaders;\nimport org.springframework.http.MediaType;\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\n\n/**\n * Provides a pre-configured {@link RestClient} for all Eventbrite facade implementations.\n * Base URL and Authorization header are applied from {@link EbProperties}.\n */\n@Configuration\npublic class EbRestClientConfig {\n\n    @Bean(name = \"ebRestClient\")\n    public RestClient ebRestClient(EbProperties props, RestClient.Builder builder) {\n        return builder\n            .baseUrl(props.getBaseUrl())\n            .defaultHeader(HttpHeaders.AUTHORIZATION, \"Bearer \" + props.getApiKey())\n            .defaultHeader(HttpHeaders.CONTENT_TYPE, MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)\n            .defaultHeader(HttpHeaders.ACCEPT, MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)\n            .build();\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

## Entry 330
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:30:05.354Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:30:05.354Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_hc26DHzEJp46JrnJVTXBW0E0",
    "output": "Chunk ID: b137ca\nWall time: 0.0505 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1838\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.request.EbInventoryTierRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbInventoryTierResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.request.EbTicketClassRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbTicketClassResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnoreProperties;\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Qualifier;\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatusCode;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\n\n@Service\npublic class DefaultEbTicketService implements EbTicketService {\n\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(DefaultEbTicketService.class);\n\n    private final RestClient client;\n\n    public DefaultEbTicketService(@Qualifier(\"ebRestClient\") RestClient client) {\n        this.client = client;\n    }\n\n    @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\n    private record TicketClassListResponse(@JsonProperty(\"ticket_classes\") List<EbTicketClassResponse> ticketClasses) {}\n\n    @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\n    private record InventoryTierListResponse(List<EbInventoryTierResponse> inventoryTiers) {}\n\n    @Override\n    public List<EbTicketClassResponse> createTicketClasses(String eventId, List<EbTicketClassRequest> ticketClasses) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Creating {} ticket class(es) for eventId={}\", ticketClasses.size(), eventId);\n            var results = new java.util.ArrayList<EbTicketClassResponse>();\n            for (EbTicketClassRequest tc : ticketClasses) {\n                EbTicketClassResponse resp = client.post()\n                    .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/\", eventId)\n                    .body(Map.of(\"ticket_class\", toTicketClassMap(tc)))\n                    .retrieve()\n                    .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createTicketClass failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                    })\n                    .body(EbTicketClassResponse.class);\n                if (resp != null) results.add(resp);\n            }\n            return results;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createTicketClasses error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public List<EbInventoryTierResponse> createInventoryTiers(String eventId, List<EbInventoryTierRequest> tiers) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Creating {} inventory tier(s) for eventId={}\", tiers.size(), eventId);\n            var results = new java.util.ArrayList<EbInventoryTierResponse>();\n            for (EbInventoryTierRequest tier : tiers) {\n                // Eventbrite inventory tiers are created as ticket classes with additional metadata\n                EbInventoryTierResponse resp = client.post()\n                    .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/\", eventId)\n                    .body(Map.of(\"ticket_class\", Map.of(\n                        \"name\", tier.name(),\n                        \"quantity_total\", tier.quantity()\n                    )))\n                    .retrieve()\n                    .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                        throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createInventoryTier failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                    })\n                    .body(EbInventoryTierResponse.class);\n                if (resp != null) results.add(resp);\n            }\n            return results;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB createInventoryTiers error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public String copySeatMap(String eventId, String sourceSeatMapId) {\n        try {\n            log.debug(\"Copying seatmap for eventId={} from sourceSeatMapId={}\", eventId, sourceSeatMapId);\n            // Eventbrite seatmap copy endpoint\n            var resp = client.post()\n                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/\", eventId)\n                .body(Map.of(\"event\", Map.of(\"is_reserved_seating\", true, \"show_pick_a_seat\", true)))\n                .retrieve()\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB copySeatMap failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                })\n                .body(Map.class);\n            return sourceSeatMapId; // mock doesn't support seatmap copy; return source ID\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB copySeatMap error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public EbTicketClassResponse getTicketClass(String eventId, String ticketClassId) {\n        try {\n            return client.get()\n                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/{ticketClassId}/\", eventId, ticketClassId)\n                .retrieve()\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB getTicketClass failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                })\n                .body(EbTicketClassResponse.class);\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB getTicketClass error: \" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Override\n    public List<EbTicketClassResponse> listTicketClasses(String eventId) {\n        try {\n            TicketClassListResponse response = client.get()\n                .uri(\"/v3/events/{eventId}/ticket_classes/\", eventId)\n                .retrieve()\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\"EB listTicketClasses failed: \" + resp2.getStatusCode());\n                })\n                .body(TicketClassListResponse.class);\n            return response == null || response.ticketClasses() == null\n                ? }

com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrganizationAuth;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrgAuthStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbOAuthTokenResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbAuthException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.repository.OrganizationAuthRepository;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class EbTokenStore {\n\n    private static final Duration REFRESH_WINDOW = Duration.ofMinutes(5);\n\n    private final OrganizationAuthRepository repository;\n    private final EbOAuthClient oauthClient;\n    private final TokenCipher tokenCipher;\n\n    public EbTokenStore(\n        OrganizationAuthRepository repository,\n        EbOAuthClient oauthClient,\n        TokenCipher tokenCipher\n    ) {\n        this.repository = repository;\n        this.oauthClient = oauthClient;\n        this.tokenCipher = tokenCipher;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public OrganizationAuth connectOrganization(Long orgId, String code, String redirectUri) {\n        EbOAuthTokenResponse tokenResponse = oauthClient.exchangeCodeForToken(code, redirectUri);\n        if (tokenResponse == null || tokenResponse.accessToken() == null) {\n            throw new EbAuthException(\"Eventbrite OAuth token exchange failed\");\n        }\n        OrganizationAuth auth = repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId)\n            .orElseGet(() -> new OrganizationAuth(orgId, tokenResponse.ebOrganizationId(), \"\"));\n\n        auth.markConnected(\n            tokenCipher.encrypt(tokenResponse.accessToken()),\n            tokenCipher.encrypt(tokenResponse.refreshToken()),\n            tokenResponse.expiresAt()\n        );\n        return repository.save(auth);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public OrganizationAuth getAuth(Long orgId) {\n        return repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new EbAuthException(\"No Eventbrite auth configured for org: \" + orgId));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void disconnect(Long orgId) {\n        repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId).ifPresent(auth -> {\n            auth.markRevoked();\n            repository.save(auth);\n        });\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public String getAccessToken(Long orgId) {\n        OrganizationAuth auth = repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new EbAuthException(\"No Eventbrite auth configured for org: \" + orgId));\n\n        if (auth.getStatus() == OrgAuthStatus.REVOKED) {\n            throw new EbAuthException(\"Eventbrite auth revoked for org: \" + orgId);\n        }\n\n        if (shouldRefresh(auth)) {\n            refreshToken(auth);\n        }\n\n        return tokenCipher.decrypt(auth.getAccessTokenEncrypted());\n    }\n\n    private boolean shouldRefresh(OrganizationAuth auth) {\n        Instant expiresAt = auth.getExpiresAt();\n        if (expiresAt == null) {\n            return false;\n        }\n        return expiresAt.isBefore(Instant.now().plus(REFRESH_WINDOW));\n    }\n\n    private void refreshToken(OrganizationAuth auth) {\n        String refreshToken = tokenCipher.decrypt(auth.getRefreshTokenEncrypted());\n        if (refreshToken == null) {\n            auth.markTokenExpired();\n            repository.save(auth);\n            throw new EbAuthException(\"Eventbrite refresh token missing\");\n        }\n\n        try {\n            EbOAuthTokenResponse refreshed = oauthClient.refreshToken(refreshToken);\n            if (refreshed == null || refreshed.accessToken() == null) {\n                auth.markTokenExpired();\n                repository.save(auth);\n                throw new EbAuthException(\"Eventbrite token refresh failed\");\n            }\n            auth.updateTokens(\n                tokenCipher.encrypt(refreshed.accessToken()),\n                tokenCipher.encrypt(refreshed.refreshToken()),\n                refreshed.expiresAt()\n            );\n            repository.save(auth);\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            auth.markTokenExpired();\n            repository.save(auth);\n            throw new EbAuthException(\"Eventbrite token refresh failed\");\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:30:23.498Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_lmKv5j7Q4IOX22ZFKx40NRZM",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 378a2b\nWall time: 0.0507 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 376\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.config;\n\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.jsr310.JavaTimeModule;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisConnectionFactory;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.StringRedisSerializer;\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate;\n\n@Configuration\npublic class RedisConfig {\n\n    @Bean\n    public ObjectMapper redisObjectMapper() {\n        ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper();\n        mapper.registerModule(new JavaTimeModule());\n        return mapper;\n    }\n\n    @Bean\n    public RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate(\n        RedisConnectionFactory connectionFactory,\n        ObjectMapper redisObjectMapper\n    ) {\n        RedisTemplate<String, Object> template = new RedisTemplate<>();\n        template.setConnectionFactory(connectionFactory);\n        GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer serializer = new GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer(redisObjectMapper);\n        template.setKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());\n        template.setValueSerializer(serializer);\n        template.setHashKeySerializer(new StringRedisSerializer());\n        template.setHashValueSerializer(serializer);\n        template.afterPropertiesSet();\n        return template;\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 362
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:30:35.550Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:30:35.550Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "I now have enough context and I’m moving into implementation.  \nPlan:\n1. Create a new `engagement` module (POM + package structure) with FR8 domain entities, enums, repositories, DTOs, MapStruct mapper, exceptions, services, controllers, event listeners, and published event.\n2. Add required platform wiring: root `pom.xml` modules, `app/pom.xml` dependency, and Flyway migrations `V38`–`V40`.\n3. Add missing shared ACL components required by FR8: `EbAttendeeService` + DTOs and `OpenAiModerationService` (with config/properties).\n4. Add internal read endpoints required by engagement:\n   - payments-ticketing: booking by user+event\n   - identity: user display name by userId\n   - discovery-catalog: Eventbrite metadata by eventId\n5. Build the project and fix compile issues, then summarize remaining spec gaps/bugs (if any).",
    "phase": "commentary"
  }
}
```

## Entry 363

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:30:35.551Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "message",
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": [
      {
        "type": "output_text",
        "text": "I now have enough context and I’m moving into implementation.  \nPlan:\n1. Create a new `engagement` module (POM + package structure) with FR8 domain entities, enums, repositories, DTOs, MapStruct mapper, exceptions, services, controllers, event listeners, and published event.\n2. Add required platform wiring: root `pom.xml` modules, `app/pom.xml` dependency, and Flyway migrations `V38`–`V40`.\n3. Add missing shared ACL components required by FR8: `EbAttendeeService` + DTOs and `OpenAiModerationService` (with config/properties).\n4. Add internal read endpoints required by engagement:\n   - payments-ticketing: booking by user+event\n   - identity: user display name by userId\n   - discovery-catalog: Eventbrite metadata by eventId\n5. Build the project and fix compile issues, then summarize remaining spec gaps/bugs (if any)."
      }
    ],
    "phase": "commentary"
  }
}
```

## Entry 371
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:30:45.445Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:30:45.445Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_VFD4G2TRb71rKisI0zsOMlA8",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 6ee8b9\nWall time: 0.0513 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 601\nOutput:\n\n        StripeRefundResponse stripeRefund = stripeRefundService.createRefund(new StripeRefundRequest(\n            booking.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\n            refundAmount,\n            reason.name().toLowerCase(),\n            \"refund-\" + booking.getBookingRef()\n        ));\n\n        RefundStatus refundStatus = toRefundStatus(stripeRefund.status());\n        if (refundStatus == RefundStatus.FAILED) {\n            throw new RefundFailedException(\"Unable to process refund at this time. Please contact support.\", stripeRefund.status());\n        }\n\n        return refundRepository.save(new Refund(\n            booking.getId(),\n            stripeRefund.refundId(),\n            refundAmount,\n            booking.getCurrency(),\n            reason,\n            refundStatus,\n            cancellationType\n        ));\n    }\n\n    private Refund createLocalSucceededRefund(\n        Booking booking,\n        long refundAmount,\n        RefundReason reason,\n        RefundCancellationType cancellationType\n    ) {\n        return refundRepository.save(new Refund(\n            booking.getId(),\n            null,\n            refundAmount,\n            booking.getCurrency(),\n            reason,\n            RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED,\n            cancellationType\n        ));\n    }\n\n    private List<Long> cancelItemsAndVoidTickets(List<BookingItem> items) {\n        Set<Long> seatIds = new LinkedHashSet<>();\n        for (BookingItem item : items) {\n            item.cancel();\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                seatIds.add(item.getSeatId());\n            }\n            eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(item.getId()).ifPresent(ETicket::voidTicket);\n        }\n        return List.copyOf(seatIds);\n    }\n\n    private void publishBookingCancelled(Booking booking, List<Long> seatIds, String reason) {\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingCancelledEvent(\n            booking.getId(),\n            booking.getCartId(),\n            seatIds,\n            booking.getUserId(),\n            reason\n        ));\n    }\n\n    private RefundStatus toRefundStatus(String stripeStatus) {\n        if (\"succeeded\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\n            return RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED;\n        }\n        if (\"failed\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus) || \"canceled\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\n            return RefundStatus.FAILED;\n        }\n        return RefundStatus.PENDING;\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

Please contact support.\", stripeRefund.status());\n        }\n\n        return refundRepository.save(new Refund(\n            booking.getId(),\n            stripeRefund.refundId(),\n            refundAmount,\n            booking.getCurrency(),\n            reason,\n            refundStatus,\n            cancellationType\n        ));\n    }\n\n    private Refund createLocalSucceededRefund(\n        Booking booking,\n        long refundAmount,\n        RefundReason reason,\n        RefundCancellationType cancellationType\n    ) {\n        return refundRepository.save(new Refund(\n            booking.getId(),\n            null,\n            refundAmount,\n            booking.getCurrency(),\n            reason,\n            RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED,\n            cancellationType\n        ));\n    }\n\n    private List<Long> cancelItemsAndVoidTickets(List<BookingItem> items) {\n        Set<Long> seatIds = new LinkedHashSet<>();\n        for (BookingItem item : items) {\n            item.cancel();\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                seatIds.add(item.getSeatId());\n            }\n            eTicketRepository.findByBookingItemId(item.getId()).ifPresent(ETicket::voidTicket);\n        }\n        return List.copyOf(seatIds);\n    }\n\n    private void publishBookingCancelled(Booking booking, List<Long> seatIds, String reason) {\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingCancelledEvent(\n            booking.getId(),\n            booking.getCartId(),\n            seatIds,\n            booking.getUserId(),\n            reason\n        ));\n    }\n\n    private RefundStatus toRefundStatus(String stripeStatus) {\n        if (\"succeeded\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\n            return RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED;\n        }\n        if (\"failed\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus) || \"canceled\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\n            return RefundStatus.FAILED;\n        }\n        return RefundStatus.PENDING;\n    }\n}\n"

## Entry 381
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:30:54.608Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:30:54.608Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_Pez8bSOTOBayl467fcOvOouF",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 277282\nWall time: 0.0505 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1289\nOutput:\n            booking.getId(),\n            item.getId(),\n            userId,\n            reason\n        )));\n\n        if (selectedItems.size() == activeItems.size()) {\n            booking.markCancellationPending();\n        }\n\n        Refund refund;\n        try {\n            refund = createRefundRecord(\n                booking,\n                reason,\n                refundAmount,\n                RefundCancellationType.BUYER_PARTIAL\n            );\n        } catch (StripeIntegrationException ex) {\n            booking.revertCancellationPending();\n            throw new RefundFailedException(\"Unable to process refund at this time. Please contact support.\", ex.getMessage());\n        }\n\n        List<Long> cancelledSeatIds = cancelItemsAndVoidTickets(selectedItems);\n        cancellationRequestRepository.findByBookingIdAndStatus(booking.getId(), CancellationRequestStatus.PENDING).stream()\n            .filter(request -> request.getBookingItemId() != null)\n            .filter(request -> selectedItems.stream().anyMatch(item -> item.getId().equals(request.getBookingItemId())))\n            .forEach(CancellationRequest::approve);\n\n        long remainingTotal = allItems.stream()\n            .filter(item -> selectedItems.stream().noneMatch(cancelled -> cancelled.getId().equals(item.getId())))\n            .filter(item -> item.getStatus() == BookingItemStatus.ACTIVE)\n            .mapToLong(BookingItem::getUnitPrice)\n            .sum();\n        booking.updateTotalAmount(remainingTotal);\n\n        long activeRemaining = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId()).stream()\n            .filter(item -> item.getStatus() == BookingItemStatus.ACTIVE)\n            .count();\n        if (activeRemaining == 0) {\n            booking.cancelFromConfirmed();\n        }\n\n        publishBookingCancelled(booking, cancelledSeatIds, \"BUYER_CANCEL\");\n\n        return new CancelItemsResponse(\n            booking.getBookingRef(),\n            booking.getStatus(),\n            selectedItems.stream().map(BookingItem::getId).toList(),\n            new CancelItemsResponse.ItemCancellationRefundResponse(\n                refund.getCancellationType().name(),\n                calculation.refundPercent(),\n                refund.getAmount(),\n                refund.getCurrency(),\n                refund.getStatus().name()\n            )\n        );\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CancellationResponse cancel(Long userId, String bookingRef, RefundReason reason) {\n        Booking booking = getOwnedBooking(userId, bookingRef);\n        ensureBookingConfirmed(booking);\n\n        List<BookingItem> activeItems = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId()).stream()\n            .filter(item -> item.getStatus() == BookingItemStatus.ACTIVE)\n            .toList();\n        if (activeItems.isEmpty()) {\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\"Booking has no active items to cancel\");\n        }\n\n        cancellationRequestRepository.save(new CancellationRequest(booking.getId(), userId, reason));\n        booking.markCancellationPending();\n\n        RefundCalculationResult calculation = cancellationPolicyService.calculateRefund(booking, booking.getTotalAmount());\n\n        Refund refund;\n        try {\n            refund = createRefundRecord(\n                booking,\n                reason,\n                calculation.refundAmountInSmallestUnit(),\n                RefundCancellationType.BUYER_FULL\n            );\n        } catch (StripeIntegrationException ex) {\n            booking.revertCancellationPending();\n            cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(booking.getId()).ifPresent(CancellationRequest::reject);\n            throw new RefundFailedException(\"Unable to process refund at this time. Please contact support.\", ex.getMessage());\n        }\n\n        List<Long> seatIds = cancelItemsAndVoidTickets(activeItems);\n        booking.cancelFromConfirmed();\n        booking.updateTotalAmount(0L);\n\n        cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(booking.getId()).ifPresent(CancellationRequest::approve);\n        publishBookingCancelled(booking, seatIds, \"BUYER_CANCEL\");\n\n        return new CancellationResponse(\n            booking.getBookingRef(),\n            booking.getStatus(),\n            new RefundResponse(refund.getStripeRefundId(), refund.getAmount(), refund.getCurrency(), refund.getStatus())\n        );\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public Refund cancelForEventCancellation(Long bookingId) {\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(bookingId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingId));\n\n        if (booking.getStatus() == BookingStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            return refundRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc(bookingId)\n                .orElseGet(() -> refundRepository.save(new Refund(\n                    bookingId,\n                    null,\n                    0L,\n                    booking.getCurrency(),\n                    RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER,\n                    RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED,\n                    RefundCancellationType.EVENT_CANCELLED\n                )));\n        }\n"
  }
}

\\\"reviews\\\")\\npublic class Review extends BaseEntity {\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"user_id\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private Long userId;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"event_id\\\", nullable = private String title;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"body\\\", nullable = false, length = 2000)\\n    private String body;\\n\\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\\n    @Column(name = \\\"status\\\", Review() {\\n    }\\n\\n    public Review(Long userId, Long eventId, int rating, String title, String body, AttendanceVerificationStatus attendanceVerificationStatus) {\\n        this.userId = userId;\\n        this.eventId = eventId;\\n        this.rating = rating;\\n        this.title = title;\\n        this.body = body;\\n        this.attendanceVerificationStatus = attendanceVerificationStatus;\\n        this.status = ReviewStatus.SUBMITTED;\\n        this.submittedAt = Instant.now();\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markPendingModeration() {\\n        if (status != ReviewStatus.SUBMITTED) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Review cannot enter pending moderation from state \\\" + status, \\\"INVALID_REVIEW_STATE\\\");\\n        }\\n        this.status = ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void approve() {\\n        if (status != ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Review cannot be approved from state \\\" + status, \\\"INVALID_REVIEW_STATE\\\");\\n        }\\n        this.status = ReviewStatus.APPROVED;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void publish() {\\n        if (status != ReviewStatus.APPROVED && status != ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Review cannot be published from state \\\" + status, \\\"INVALID_REVIEW_STATE\\\");\\n        }\\n        this.status = ReviewStatus.PUBLISHED;\\n        this.publishedAt = Instant.now();\\n    }\\n\\n    public void reject(String rejectionReason) {\\n        if (status == ReviewStatus.REJECTED) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (status != ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n            throw new com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.BaseEntity;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Column;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Entity;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.EnumType;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Enumerated;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.FetchType;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.JoinColumn;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.ManyToOne;\\nimport jakarta.persistence.Table;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\n\\n@Entity\\n@Table(name = \\\"moderation_records\\\")\\npublic class ModerationRecord extends BaseEntity {\\n\\n    @ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY, optional = false)\\n ModerationMethod method;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"input_text\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private String inputText;\\n\\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\\n    @Column(name = \\\"decision\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private ModerationDecision decision;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"flags\\\", length = 500)\\n    private String flags;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"scores_json\\\")\\n    private String scoresJson;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"moderator_id\\\")\\n    private Long moderatorId;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"reason\\\", length = 500)\\n    private String reason;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"auto_retry_count\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private int autoRetryCount;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"retry_after\\\")\\n    private Instant retryAfter;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"decided_at\\\")\\n    private Instant decidedAt;\\n\\n    protected ModerationRecord() {\\n    }\\n\\n    public ModerationRecord(Review review, ModerationMethod method, String inputText) {\\n        this.review = review;\\n        this.method = method;\\n        this.inputText = inputText;\\n        this.decision = ModerationDecision.PENDING;\\n        this.autoRetryCount = 0;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markApproved(String flags, String scoresJson) {\\n        this.decision = ModerationDecision.APPROVED;\\n        this.flags = flags;\\n        this.scoresJson = scoresJson;\\n        this.decidedAt = Instant.now();\\n        this.retryAfter = null;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markRejected(String flags, String scoresJson, String reason) {\\n        this.decision = ModerationDecision.REJECTED;\\n        this.flags = flags;\\n        this.scoresJson = scoresJson;\\n        this.reason = reason;\\n        this.decidedAt = Instant.now();\\n        this.retryAfter = null;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markManualDecision(Long moderatorId, ModerationDecision decision, String reason) {\\n        this.moderatorId = moderatorId;\\n        this.decision = decision;\\n        this.reason = reason;\\n        this.decidedAt = Instant.now();\\n        this.retryAfter = null;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markRetryScheduled(Instant retryAfter) {\\n        this.autoRetryCount++;\\n        this.retryAfter = retryAfter;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markRetryExhausted() {\\n        this.autoRetryCount++;\\n        this.retryAfter = null;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Review getReview() {\\n        return review;\\n    }\\n\\n    public ModerationMethod getMethod() {\\n        return method;\\n    }\\n\\n    public String getInputText() {\\n        return inputText;\\n    }\\n\\n    public ModerationDecision getDecision() {\\n        return decision;\\n    }\\n\\n    public String getFlags() {\\n        return flags;\\n    }\\n\\n    public String getScoresJson() {\\n        return scoresJson;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Long getModeratorId() {\\n        return moderatorId;\\n    }\\n\\n    public String getReason() {\\n        return reason;\\n    }\\n\\n    public int getAutoRetryCount() {\\n        return autoRetryCount;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Instant getRetryAfter() {\\n        return retryAfter;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Instant attendanceVerificationStatus;\\n        this.status = ReviewStatus.SUBMITTED;\\n        this.submittedAt = Instant.now();\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markPendingModeration() {\\n        if (status != ReviewStatus.SUBMITTED) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Review cannot enter pending moderation from state \\\" + status, \\\"INVALID_REVIEW_STATE\\\");\\n        }\\n        this.status = ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void approve() {\\n        if (status != ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Review cannot be approved from state \\\" + status, \\\"INVALID_REVIEW_STATE\\\");\\n        }\\n        this.status = ReviewStatus.APPROVED;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void publish() {\\n        if (status != ReviewStatus.APPROVED && status != ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\\\"Review cannot be published from state \\\" + status, \\\"INVALID_REVIEW_STATE\\\");\\n        }\\n        this.status = ReviewStatus.PUBLISHED;\\n        this.publishedAt = Instant.now();\\n    }\\n\\n    public void reject(String rejectionReason) {\\n        if (status == ReviewStatus.REJECTED) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        if (status != ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n            throw new @Column(name = \\\"auto_retry_count\\\", nullable = false)\\n    private int autoRetryCount;\\n\\n    @Column(name = \\\"retry_after\\\")\\n    private Instant retryAfter;\\n\\n    @Column(name = public void markApproved(String flags, String scoresJson) {\\n        this.decision = ModerationDecision.APPROVED;\\n        this.flags = flags;\\n        this.scoresJson = scoresJson;\\n        this.decidedAt = Instant.now();\\n        this.retryAfter = null;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markRejected(String flags, String scoresJson, String reason) {\\n        this.decision = null;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markManualDecision(Long moderatorId, ModerationDecision decision, String reason) {\\n        this.moderatorId = moderatorId;\\n        this.decision = decision;\\n        this.reason = reason;\\n        this.decidedAt = Instant.now();\\n        this.retryAfter = null;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void markRetryScheduled(Instant retryAfter) {\\n {

  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > engagement/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/engagement/repository/ReviewEligibilityRepository.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.engagement.repository;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.ReviewEligibility;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\\n\\npublic interface ReviewEligibilityRepository extends JpaRepository<ReviewEligibility, Long> {\\n\\n    Optional<ReviewEligibility> findByUserIdAndEventId(Long userId, Long eventId);\\n\\n    Optional<ReviewEligibility> findByBookingId(Long bookingId);\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > engagement/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/engagement/repository/ReviewRepository.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.engagement.repository;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.Review;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.enums.ReviewStatus;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.Query;\\n\\npublic interface ReviewRepository extends JpaRepository<Review, Long> {\\n\\n    boolean existsByUserIdAndEventId(Long userId, Long eventId);\\n\\n    Optional<Review> findByUserIdAndEventId(Long userId, Long eventId);\\n\\n    Page<Review> findByEventIdAndStatusOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(Long eventId, ReviewStatus status, Pageable pageable);\\n\\n    Page<Review> findByUserIdOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(Long userId, Pageable pageable);\\n\\n    @Query(\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n        select\\n          coalesce(avg(r.rating), 0),\\n          count(r),\\n          sum(case when r.rating = 1 then 1 else 0 end),\\n          sum(case when r.rating = 2 then 1 else 0 end),\\n          sum(case when r.rating = 3 then 1 else 0 end),\\n          sum(case when r.rating = 4 then 1 else 0 end),\\n          sum(case when r.rating = 5 then 1 else 0 end)\\n        from Review r\\n        where r.eventId = :eventId and r.status = 'PUBLISHED'\\n        \\\"\\\"\\\")\\n    Object[] summarizeByEventId(Long eventId);\\n\\n    Page<Review> findByStatusAndEventIdAndSubmittedAtGreaterThanEqualOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(\\n        ReviewStatus status,\\n        Long eventId,\\n        java.time.Instant submittedAfter,\\n        Pageable pageable\\n    );\\n\\n    Page<Review> findByStatusAndEventIdOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(ReviewStatus status, Long eventId, Pageable pageable);\\n\\n    Page<Review> findByStatusAndSubmittedAtGreaterThanEqualOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(\\n        ReviewStatus status,\\n        java.time.Instant submittedAfter,\\n        Pageable pageable\\n    );\\n\\n    Page<Review> findByStatusOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(ReviewStatus status, Pageable pageable);\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > engagement/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/engagement/repository/ModerationRecordRepository.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.engagement.repository;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.ModerationRecord;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.Review;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.enums.ModerationDecision;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.enums.ModerationMethod;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;\\n\\npublic interface ModerationRecordRepository extends JpaRepository<ModerationRecord, Long> {\\n\\n    Optional<ModerationRecord> findTopByReviewAndMethodOrderByCreatedAtDesc(Review review, ModerationMethod method);\\n\\n    List<ModerationRecord> findByDecisionAndRetryAfterLessThanEqualAndAutoRetryCountLessThan(\\n        ModerationDecision decision,\\n        Instant retryAfter,\\n        int maxRetries\\n    );\\n\\n    int countByReviewAndMethod(Review review, ModerationMethod method);\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_uOuFKG1zKe26wHzETFXKYv1l"
  }
}

## Entry 453
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:33:48.591Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:33:48.591Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > engagement/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/engagement/mapper/ReviewMapper.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.engagement.mapper;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.api.dto.response.AdminReviewResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.api.dto.response.ReviewResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.ModerationRecord;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.Review;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.enums.ModerationDecision;\\nimport org.mapstruct.Mapper;\\n\\n@Mapper(componentModel = \\\"spring\\\")\\npublic interface ReviewMapper {\\n\\n    default ReviewResponse toReviewResponse(Review review, String reviewerDisplayName) {\\n        return new ReviewResponse(\\n            review.getId(),\\n            review.getEventId(),\\n            review.getRating(),\\n            review.getTitle(),\\n            review.getBody(),\\n            review.getStatus(),\\n            review.getAttendanceVerificationStatus(),\\n            review.getRejectionReason(),\\n            review.getSubmittedAt(),\\n            review.getPublishedAt(),\\n            reviewerDisplayName\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    default AdminReviewResponse toAdminReviewResponse(Review review, int autoModerationAttempts, ModerationDecision lastAutoDecision) {\\n        return new AdminReviewResponse(\\n            review.getId(),\\n            review.getEventId(),\\n            review.getUserId(),\\n            review.getRating(),\\n            review.getTitle(),\\n            review.getBody(),\\n            review.getStatus(),\\n            review.getAttendanceVerificationStatus(),\\n            review.getSubmittedAt(),\\n            autoModerationAttempts,\\n            lastAutoDecision\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    default ModerationDecision resolveLastAutoDecision(ModerationRecord record) {\\n        return record == null ? null : record.getDecision();\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_TY8NsQ9qxinr35WNEbVSIIrX"
  }
}
```
**Metadata:**

## Entry 460
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:35:53.643Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:35:53.643Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > engagement/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/engagement/service/ReviewEligibilityService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.engagement.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.Review;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.ReviewEligibility;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.enums.ReviewEligibilityStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.enums.ReviewStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.exception.ReviewNotEligibleException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.repository.ReviewEligibilityRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.repository.ReviewRepository;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class ReviewEligibilityService {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ReviewEligibilityService.class);\\n\\n    private final ReviewEligibilityRepository reviewEligibilityRepository;\\n    private final ReviewRepository reviewRepository;\\n    private final PaymentBookingLookupService paymentBookingLookupService;\\n    private final Integer eligibilityWindowDays;\\n\\n    public ReviewEligibilityService(\\n        ReviewEligibilityRepository reviewEligibilityRepository,\\n        ReviewRepository reviewRepository,\\n        PaymentBookingLookupService paymentBookingLookupService,\\n        @Value(\\\"${engagement.review.eligibility-window-days:0}\\\") Integer eligibilityWindowDays\\n    ) {\\n        this.reviewEligibilityRepository = reviewEligibilityRepository;\\n        this.reviewRepository = reviewRepository;\\n        this.paymentBookingLookupService = paymentBookingLookupService;\\n        this.eligibilityWindowDays = eligibilityWindowDays;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void unlockForBooking(Long bookingId, Long userId) {\\n        PaymentBookingLookupService.BookingSnapshot booking = paymentBookingLookupService.getBookingById(bookingId);\\n        if (booking == null || booking.eventId() == null) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Cannot unlock review eligibility because booking lookup failed. bookingId={} userId={}\\\", bookingId, userId);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        Instant eligibleUntil = null;\\n        if (eligibilityWindowDays != null && eligibilityWindowDays > 0) {\\n            eligibleUntil = Instant.now().plus(eligibilityWindowDays, ChronoUnit.DAYS);\\n        }\\n\\n        Optional<ReviewEligibility> existing = reviewEligibilityRepository.findByUserIdAndEventId(userId, booking.eventId());\\n        if (existing.isPresent()) {\\n            ReviewEligibility eligibility = existing.get();\\n            eligibility.unlock(booking.slotId(), bookingId, eligibleUntil);\\n            reviewEligibilityRepository.save(eligibility);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        reviewEligibilityRepository.save(new ReviewEligibility(\\n            userId,\\n            booking.eventId(),\\n            booking.slotId(),\\n            bookingId,\\n            eligibleUntil\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void revokeForBooking(Long bookingId) {\\n        Optional<ReviewEligibility> eligibilityOpt = reviewEligibilityRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId);\\n        if (eligibilityOpt.isEmpty()) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        ReviewEligibility eligibility = eligibilityOpt.get();\\n        PaymentBookingLookupService.BookingSnapshot booking = paymentBookingLookupService.getBookingById(bookingId);\\n        if (booking == null || !\\\"CANCELLED\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(booking.status())) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        Optional<Review> reviewOpt = reviewRepository.findByUserIdAndEventId(eligibility.getUserId(), eligibility.getEventId());\\n        if (reviewOpt.isPresent()) {\\n            Review review = reviewOpt.get();\\n            if (review.getStatus() == ReviewStatus.PUBLISHED) {\\n                return;\\n            }\\n            if (review.getStatus() == ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n                review.reject(\\\"Booking cancelled\\\");\\n                reviewRepository.save(review);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        eligibility.revoke();\\n        reviewEligibilityRepository.save(eligibility);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public ReviewEligibility validateEligibility(Long userId, Long eventId) {\\n        ReviewEligibility eligibility = reviewEligibilityRepository.findByUserIdAndEventId(userId, eventId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new ReviewNotEligibleException(\\\"You are not eligible to review this event\\\", \\\"REVIEW_NOT_ELIGIBLE\\\"));\\n\\n        if (eligibility.getStatus() != ReviewEligibilityStatus.UNLOCKED) {\\n            throw new ReviewNotEligibleException(\\\"You are not eligible to review this event\\\", \\\"REVIEW_NOT_ELIGIBLE\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        if (eligibility.getEligibleUntil() != null && eligibility.getEligibleUntil().isBefore(Instant.now())) {\\n            eligibility.markExpired();\\n            reviewEligibilityRepository.save(eligibility);\\n            throw new ReviewNotEligibleException(\\\"Review submission window has closed\\\", \\\"REVIEW_WINDOW_CLOSED\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        return eligibility;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > engagement/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/engagement/service/PaymentBookingLookupService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage }\\n    }\\n\\n    public record BookingEligibilitySnapshot(Long bookingId, Long userId, Long eventId, Long slotId, Long orgId, String status) {\\n    }\\n\\n    public record BookingSnapshot(Long com.eventplatform.engagement.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.enums.AttendanceVerificationStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.exception.ReviewNotEligibleException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbAttendeeResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbAuthException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbAttendeeService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTokenStore;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class AttendanceVerificationService {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(AttendanceVerificationService.class);\\n\\n    private final PaymentBookingLookupService paymentBookingLookupService;\\n    private final EventMetadataLookupService eventMetadataLookupService;\\n    private final IdentityLookupService identityLookupService;\\n    private final EbTokenStore ebTokenStore;\\n    private final EbAttendeeService ebAttendeeService;\\n\\n    public AttendanceVerificationService(\\n        PaymentBookingLookupService paymentBookingLookupService,\\n        EventMetadataLookupService eventMetadataLookupService,\\n        IdentityLookupService identityLookupService,\\n        EbTokenStore ebTokenStore,\\n        EbAttendeeService ebAttendeeService\\n    ) {\\n        this.paymentBookingLookupService = paymentBookingLookupService;\\n        this.eventMetadataLookupService = eventMetadataLookupService;\\n        this.identityLookupService = identityLookupService;\\n        this.ebTokenStore = ebTokenStore;\\n        this.ebAttendeeService = ebAttendeeService;\\n    }\\n\\n    public AttendanceVerificationStatus verify(Long userId, Long eventId) {\\n        PaymentBookingLookupService.BookingEligibilitySnapshot booking = paymentBookingLookupService.getConfirmedBookingByUserEvent(userId, eventId);\\n        if (booking == null || !\\\"CONFIRMED\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(booking.status())) {\\n            throw new ReviewNotEligibleException(\\\"You are not eligible to review this event\\\", \\\"REVIEW_NOT_ELIGIBLE\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        EventMetadataLookupService.EventMetadata metadata = eventMetadataLookupService.getEventMetadataOrNull(eventId);\\n        if (metadata == null || metadata.ebEventId() == null || metadata.ebEventId().isBlank()) {\\n            return AttendanceVerificationStatus.ATTENDANCE_SELF_REPORTED;\\n        }\\n\\n        String email = identityLookupService.getEmail(userId);\\n        if (email == null || email.isBlank()) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Cannot verify Eventbrite attendance because user email missing. userId={} eventId={}\\\", userId, eventId);\\n            return AttendanceVerificationStatus.ATTENDANCE_SELF_REPORTED;\\n        }\\n\\n        try {\\n            String orgToken = ebTokenStore.getAccessToken(metadata.orgId());\\n            List<EbAttendeeResponse> attendees = ebAttendeeService.getAttendeesByEvent(orgToken, metadata.ebEventId());\\n            EbAttendeeResponse attendee = attendees.stream()\\n                .filter(a -> a.profile() != null && a.profile().email() != null)\\n                .filter(a -> a.profile().email().equalsIgnoreCase(email))\\n                .findFirst()\\n                .orElse(null);\\n\\n            if (attendee == null) {\\n                log.warn(\\\"Eventbrite attendee not found. userId={} eventId={} ebEventId={}\\\", userId, eventId, metadata.ebEventId());\\n                return AttendanceVerificationStatus.ATTENDANCE_SELF_REPORTED;\\n            }\\n            if (!attendee.cancelled() && !attendee.refunded()) {\\n                return AttendanceVerificationStatus.EB_VERIFIED;\\n            }\\n            return AttendanceVerificationStatus.ATTENDANCE_SELF_REPORTED;\\n        } catch (EbAuthException ex) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Eventbrite attendance verification unavailable due to auth failure. userId={} eventId={}\\\", userId, eventId);\\n            return AttendanceVerificationStatus.ATTENDANCE_EB_UNAVAILABLE;\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Eventbrite attendance verification unavailable. userId={} eventId={}\\\", userId, eventId, ex);\\n            return AttendanceVerificationStatus.ATTENDANCE_EB_UNAVAILABLE;\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > engagement/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/engagement/service/ReviewRatingSummaryService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.engagement.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.api.dto.response.ReviewSummaryResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.repository.ReviewRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.service.model.ReviewRatingSummary;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.ReviewPublishedEvent;\\nimport java.math.BigDecimal;\\nimport java.math.RoundingMode;\\nimport java.time.Duration;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.LinkedHashMap;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.event.TransactionalEventListener;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class ReviewRatingSummaryService {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ReviewRatingSummaryService.class);\\n    private static final Duration TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(5);\\n    private static final String CACHE_KEY_PREFIX = \\\"engagement:review:summary:\\\";\\n\\n    private final RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate;\\n    private final ReviewRepository reviewRepository;\\n\\n    public ReviewRatingSummaryService(RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate, ReviewRepository reviewRepository) {\\n        this.redisTemplate = redisTemplate;\\n        this.reviewRepository = reviewRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    public ReviewSummaryResponse getSummary(Long eventId) {\\n        String key = CACHE_KEY_PREFIX + eventId;\\n        try {\\n            Object cached = redisTemplate.opsForValue().get(key);\\n            if (cached instanceof ReviewRatingSummary summary) {\\n                return toResponse(summary);\\n            }\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Failed to read review summary cache. eventId={}\\\", eventId, ex);\\n        }\\n\\n        ReviewRatingSummary computed = computeSummary(eventId);\\n        try {\\n            redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(key, computed, TTL);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Failed to write review summary cache. eventId={}\\\", eventId, ex);\\n        }\\n        return toResponse(computed);\\n    }\\n\\n    @TransactionalEventListener\\n    public void onReviewPublished(ReviewPublishedEvent event) {\\n        try {\\n            redisTemplate.delete(CACHE_KEY_PREFIX + event.eventId());\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Failed to invalidate review summary cache. eventId={}\\\", event.eventId(), ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private ReviewRatingSummary computeSummary(Long eventId) {\\n        Object[] row = reviewRepository.summarizeByEventId(eventId);\\n        BigDecimal average = asBigDecimal(row[0]).setScale(1, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);\\n        long total = asLong(row[1]);\\n        Map<Integer, Long> distribution = new LinkedHashMap<>();\\n        distribution.put(1, asLong(row[2]));\\n        distribution.put(2, asLong(row[3]));\\n        distribution.put(3, asLong(row[4]));\\n        distribution.put(4, asLong(row[5]));\\n        distribution.put(5, asLong(row[6]));\\n        return new ReviewRatingSummary(eventId, average, total, distribution, Instant.now());\\n    }\\n\\n    private ReviewSummaryResponse toResponse(ReviewRatingSummary summary) {\\n        return new ReviewSummaryResponse(\\n            summary.eventId(),\\n            summary.averageRating(),\\n            summary.totalReviews(),\\n            summary.distribution(),\\n            summary.cachedAt()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    private long asLong(Object value) {\\n        if (value == null) {\\n            return 0L;\\n        }\\n        if (value instanceof Number number) {\\n            return number.longValue();\\n        }\\n        return Long.parseLong(value.toString());\\n    }\\n\\n    private BigDecimal asBigDecimal(Object value) {\\n        if (value == null) {\\n            return BigDecimal.ZERO;\\n        }\\n        if (value instanceof BigDecimal decimal) {\\n            return decimal;\\n        }\\n        if (value instanceof Number number) {\\n            return BigDecimal.valueOf(number.doubleValue());\\n        }\\n        return new BigDecimal(value.toString());\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > engagement/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/engagement/service/ModerationService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.engagement.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.api.dto.response.AdminReviewResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.api.dto.response.ModerationResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.ModerationRecord;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.Review;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.enums.ModerationDecision;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.enums.ModerationMethod;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.enums.ReviewStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.exception.ReviewAlreadyModeratedException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.exception.ReviewNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.ReviewPublishedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.openai.service.OpenAiModerationService;\\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException;\\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;\\nimport io.micrometer.core.instrument.Counter;\\nimport io.micrometer.core.instrument.MeterRegistry;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.slf4j.Logger;\\nimport org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;\\nimport org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Scheduled;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class ModerationService {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ModerationService.class);\\n\\n    private final ReviewRepository reviewRepository;\\n    private final ModerationRecordRepository moderationRecordRepository;\\n    private final OpenAiModerationService openAiModerationService;\\n    private final ReviewMapper reviewMapper;\\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\\n    private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;\\n    private final Counter autoApprovedCounter;\\n    private final Counter autoRejectedCounter;\\n    private final Counter autoExhaustedCounter;\\n\\n    public ModerationService(\\n        ReviewRepository reviewRepository,\\n        ModerationRecordRepository moderationRecordRepository,\\n        OpenAiModerationService openAiModerationService,\\n        ReviewMapper reviewMapper,\\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher,\\n        ObjectMapper objectMapper,\\n        MeterRegistry meterRegistry\\n    ) {\\n        this.reviewRepository = reviewRepository;\\n        this.moderationRecordRepository = moderationRecordRepository;\\n        this.openAiModerationService = openAiModerationService;\\n        this.reviewMapper = reviewMapper;\\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\\n        this.objectMapper = objectMapper;\\n        this.autoApprovedCounter = meterRegistry.counter(\\\"engagement.review.moderation.auto.approved\\\");\\n        this.autoRejectedCounter = meterRegistry.counter(\\\"engagement.review.moderation.auto.rejected\\\");\\n        this.autoExhaustedCounter = meterRegistry.counter(\\\"engagement.review.moderation.auto.exhausted\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void triggerAutoModeration(Long reviewId) {\\n        Review review = reviewRepository.findById(reviewId).orElse(null);\\n        if (review == null || review.getStatus() != ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        String inputText = review.getTitle() + \\\" \\\" + review.getBody();\\n        ModerationRecord record = new ModerationRecord(review, ModerationMethod.AUTO, inputText);\\n        moderationRecordRepository.save(record);\\n        processAutoModeration(record);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public ModerationResponse applyManualDecision(Long adminId, Long reviewId, ManualModerationDecision decision, String reason) {\\n        Review review = reviewRepository.findById(reviewId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new ReviewNotFoundException(reviewId));\\n\\n        if (review.getStatus() != ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n            throw new ReviewAlreadyModeratedException();\\n        }\\n\\n        ModerationRecord record = new ModerationRecord(review, ModerationMethod.MANUAL, review.getTitle() + \\\" \\\" + review.getBody());\\n        if (decision == ManualModerationDecision.APPROVE) {\\n            record.markManualDecision(adminId, ModerationDecision.APPROVED, reason);\\n            review.approve();\\n            review.publish();\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ReviewPublishedEvent(review.getId(), review.getEventId(), review.getRating()));\\n        } else {\\n            if (reason == null || reason.isBlank()) {\\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"reason is required for reject decision\\\");\\n            }\\n            record.markManualDecision(adminId, ModerationDecision.REJECTED, reason);\\n            review.reject(reason);\\n        }\\n        moderationRecordRepository.save(record);\\n        reviewRepository.save(review);\\n\\n        return new ModerationResponse(review.getId(), review.getStatus(), record.getDecidedAt());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public Page<AdminReviewResponse> listAdminQueue(\\n        ReviewStatus status,\\n        Long eventId,\\n        Instant submittedAfter,\\n        Pageable pageable\\n    ) {\\n        Page<Review> reviews;\\n        if (eventId != null && submittedAfter != null) {\\n            reviews = reviewRepository.findByStatusAndEventIdAndSubmittedAtGreaterThanEqualOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(\\n                status,\\n                eventId,\\n                submittedAfter,\\n                pageable\\n            );\\n        } else if (eventId != null) {\\n            reviews = reviewRepository.findByStatusAndEventIdOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(status, eventId, pageable);\\n        } else if (submittedAfter != null) {\\n            reviews = reviewRepository.findByStatusAndSubmittedAtGreaterThanEqualOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(status, submittedAfter, pageable);\\n        } else {\\n            reviews = reviewRepository.findByStatusOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(status, pageable);\\n        }\\n\\n        return reviews.map(review -> {\\n            int attempts = moderationRecordRepository.countByReviewAndMethod(review, ModerationMethod.AUTO);\\n            ModerationRecord lastAuto = moderationRecordRepository.findTopByReviewAndMethodOrderByCreatedAtDesc(review, ModerationMethod.AUTO)\\n                .orElse(null);\\n            return reviewMapper.toAdminReviewResponse(review, attempts, reviewMapper.resolveLastAutoDecision(lastAuto));\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    @Scheduled(fixedDelay = 30_000)\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void retryPendingModerations() {\\n        List<ModerationRecord> pending = moderationRecordRepository.findByDecisionAndRetryAfterLessThanEqualAndAutoRetryCountLessThan(\\n            ModerationDecision.PENDING,\\n            Instant.now(),\\n            3\\n        );\\n\\n        int processed = 0;\\n        for (ModerationRecord record : pending) {\\n            try {\\n                processAutoModeration(record);\\n                processed++;\\n            } catch (Exception ex) {\\n                log.error(\\\"Failed moderation retry. moderationRecordId={} reviewId={}\\\", record.getId(), record.getReview().getId(), ex);\\n            }\\n        }\\n        if (processed > 0) {\\n            log.info(\\\"Processed {} moderation retries\\\", processed);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private void processAutoModeration(ModerationRecord record) {\\n        Review review = record.getReview();\\n        if (review.getStatus() != ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        try {\\n            OpenAiModerationService.ModerationResult result = openAiModerationService.moderate(record.getInputText());\\n            String flags = String.join(\\\",\\\", result.flaggedCategories());\\n            String scoresJson = toJson(result.categoryScores());\\n            if (!result.flagged()) {\\n                record.markApproved(flags, scoresJson);\\n                review.approve();\\n                review.publish();\\n                eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ReviewPublishedEvent(review.getId(), review.getEventId(), review.getRating()));\\n                autoApprovedCounter.increment();\\n            } else {\\n                String topCategory = result.flaggedCategories().isEmpty() ? \\\"content_policy_violation\\\" : result.flaggedCategories().get(0);\\n                record.markRejected(flags, scoresJson, topCategory);\\n                review.reject(topCategory);\\n                autoRejectedCounter.increment();\\n            }\\n            moderationRecordRepository.save(record);\\n            reviewRepository.save(review);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            scheduleRetry(record, review.getId(), ex);\\n            moderationRecordRepository.save(record);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private void scheduleRetry(ModerationRecord record, Long reviewId, Exception ex) {\\n        if (record.getAutoRetryCount() >= 2) {\\n            record.markRetryExhausted();\\n            autoExhaustedCounter.increment();\\n            log.error(\\\"Auto moderation retries exhausted. reviewId={}\\\", reviewId, ex);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        int nextAttempt = record.getAutoRetryCount() + 1;\\n        Instant retryAt;\\n        if (nextAttempt == 1) {\\n            retryAt = Instant.now().plusSeconds(30);\\n        } else if (nextAttempt == 2) {\\n            retryAt = Instant.now().plusSeconds(120);\\n        } else {\\n            retryAt = Instant.now().plusSeconds(600);\\n        }\\n        record.markRetryScheduled(retryAt);\\n        log.warn(\\\"Auto moderation failed. reviewId={} retryAttempt={} retryAfter={}\\\", reviewId, nextAttempt, retryAt, ex);\\n    }\\n\\n    private String toJson(Object value) {\\n        try {\\n            return objectMapper.writeValueAsString(value);\\n        } catch (JsonProcessingException ex) {\\n            return \\\"{}\\\";\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > engagement/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/engagement/service/ReviewService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.engagement.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.api.dto.request.ReviewSubmitRequest;\\nimport
