com.eventplatform.engagement.exception.ReviewAlreadySubmittedException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.mapper.ReviewMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.repository.ReviewRepository;\\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class ReviewService {\\n\\n    private final ReviewRepository reviewRepository;\\n    private final ReviewEligibilityService reviewEligibilityService;\\n    private final AttendanceVerificationService attendanceVerificationService;\\n    private final ReviewMapper reviewMapper;\\n    private final IdentityLookupService identityLookupService;\\n    private final EventMetadataLookupService eventMetadataLookupService;\\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\\n\\n    public ReviewService(\\n        ReviewRepository reviewRepository,\\n        ReviewEligibilityService reviewEligibilityService,\\n        AttendanceVerificationService attendanceVerificationService,\\n        ReviewMapper reviewMapper,\\n        IdentityLookupService identityLookupService,\\n        EventMetadataLookupService eventMetadataLookupService,\\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\\n    ) {\\n        this.reviewRepository = reviewRepository;\\n        this.reviewEligibilityService = reviewEligibilityService;\\n        this.attendanceVerificationService = attendanceVerificationService;\\n        this.reviewMapper = reviewMapper;\\n        this.identityLookupService = identityLookupService;\\n        this.eventMetadataLookupService = eventMetadataLookupService;\\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public ReviewSubmitResponse submitReview(Long userId, ReviewSubmitRequest request) {\\n        if (request.rating() == null || request.rating() < 1 || request.rating() > 5) {\\n            throw new InvalidRatingException();\\n        }\\n\\n        reviewEligibilityService.validateEligibility(userId, request.eventId());\\n\\n        if (reviewRepository.existsByUserIdAndEventId(userId, request.eventId())) {\\n            throw new ReviewAlreadySubmittedException();\\n        }\\n\\n        AttendanceVerificationStatus attendanceStatus = attendanceVerificationService.verify(userId, request.eventId());\\n\\n        Review review = new Review(\\n            userId,\\n            request.eventId(),\\n            request.rating(),\\n            request.title(),\\n            request.body(),\\n            attendanceStatus\\n        );\\n        review.markPendingModeration();\\n        Review saved = reviewRepository.save(review);\\n\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ModerationRequiredEvent(saved.getId()));\\n        return new ReviewSubmitResponse(saved.getId(), saved.getStatus(), \\\"Your review has been submitted and is under moderation.\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public Page<ReviewResponse> listPublishedReviews(Long eventId, Pageable pageable) {\\n        eventMetadataLookupService.getRequiredEventMetadata(eventId);\\n        Page<Review> page = reviewRepository.findByEventIdAndStatusOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(eventId, ReviewStatus.PUBLISHED, pageable);\\n        return page.map(review -> reviewMapper.toReviewResponse(review, identityLookupService.getDisplayName(review.getUserId())));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public Page<ReviewResponse> listMyReviews(Long userId, Pageable pageable) {\\n        return reviewRepository.findByUserIdOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(userId, pageable)\\n            .map(review -> reviewMapper.toReviewResponse(review, identityLookupService.getDisplayName(review.getUserId())));\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;\\nimport org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.event.TransactionalEventListener;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class ReviewRatingSummaryService {\\n\\n    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(ReviewRatingSummaryService.class);\\n    private static final Duration TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(5);\\n    private static final String CACHE_KEY_PREFIX = \\\"engagement:review:summary:\\\";\\n\\n    private final RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate;\\n    private final ReviewRepository reviewRepository;\\n\\n    public ReviewRatingSummaryService(RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate, ReviewRepository reviewRepository) {\\n        this.redisTemplate = redisTemplate;\\n        this.reviewRepository = reviewRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    public ReviewSummaryResponse getSummary(Long eventId) {\\n        String key = CACHE_KEY_PREFIX + eventId;\\n        try {\\n            Object cached = redisTemplate.opsForValue().get(key);\\n            if (cached instanceof ReviewRatingSummary summary) {\\n                return toResponse(summary);\\n            }\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Failed to read review summary cache. eventId={}\\\", eventId, ex);\\n        }\\n\\n        ReviewRatingSummary computed = computeSummary(eventId);\\n        try {\\n            redisTemplate.opsForValue().set(key, computed, TTL);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Failed to write review summary cache. eventId={}\\\", eventId, ex);\\n        }\\n        return toResponse(computed);\\n    }\\n\\n    @TransactionalEventListener\\n    public void onReviewPublished(ReviewPublishedEvent event) {\\n        try {\\n            redisTemplate.delete(CACHE_KEY_PREFIX + event.eventId());\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            log.warn(\\\"Failed to invalidate review summary cache. eventId={}\\\", event.eventId(), ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private ReviewRatingSummary computeSummary(Long eventId) {\\n        Object[] row = reviewRepository.summarizeByEventId(eventId);\\n        BigDecimal average = asBigDecimal(row[0]).setScale(1, RoundingMode.HALF_UP);\\n        long total = asLong(row[1]);\\n        Map<Integer, Long> distribution = new LinkedHashMap<>();\\n        distribution.put(1, asLong(row[2]));\\n        distribution.put(2, asLong(row[3]));\\n        distribution.put(3, asLong(row[4]));\\n        distribution.put(4, asLong(row[5]));\\n        distribution.put(5, asLong(row[6]));\\n        return new ReviewRatingSummary(eventId, average, total, distribution, Instant.now());\\n    }\\n\\n    private ReviewSummaryResponse toResponse(ReviewRatingSummary summary) {\\n        return new ReviewSummaryResponse(\\n            summary.eventId(),\\n            summary.averageRating(),\\n            summary.totalReviews(),\\n            summary.distribution(),\\n            summary.cachedAt()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    private long asLong(Object value) {\\n        if (value == null) {\\n            return 0L;\\n        }\\n        if (value instanceof Number number) {\\n            return number.longValue();\\n        }\\n        return Long.parseLong(value.toString());\\n    }\\n\\n    private BigDecimal asBigDecimal(Object value) {\\n        if (value == null) {\\n            return BigDecimal.ZERO;\\n        }\\n        if (value instanceof BigDecimal decimal) {\\n            return decimal;\\n        }\\n        if (value instanceof Number number) {\\n            return BigDecimal.valueOf(number.doubleValue());\\n        }\\n        return new BigDecimal(value.toString());\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > this.autoExhaustedCounter = meterRegistry.counter(\\\"engagement.review.moderation.auto.exhausted\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void triggerAutoModeration(Long reviewId) {\\n        Review review = reviewRepository.findById(reviewId).orElse(null);\\n        if (review == null || review.getStatus() != ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        String inputText = review.getTitle() + \\\" \\\" + review.getBody();\\n        ModerationRecord record = new ModerationRecord(review, ModerationMethod.AUTO, inputText);\\n        moderationRecordRepository.save(record);\\n        processAutoModeration(record);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public ModerationResponse applyManualDecision(Long adminId, Long reviewId, ManualModerationDecision decision, String reason) {\\n        Review review = reviewRepository.findById(reviewId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new ReviewNotFoundException(reviewId));\\n\\n        if (review.getStatus() != ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n            throw new ReviewAlreadyModeratedException();\\n        }\\n\\n        ModerationRecord record = new ModerationRecord(review, ModerationMethod.MANUAL, review.getTitle() + \\\" \\\" + review.getBody());\\n        if (decision == ManualModerationDecision.APPROVE) {\\n            record.markManualDecision(adminId, ModerationDecision.APPROVED, reason);\\n            review.approve();\\n            review.publish();\\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ReviewPublishedEvent(review.getId(), review.getEventId(), review.getRating()));\\n        } else {\\n            if (reason == null || reason.isBlank()) {\\n                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"reason is required for reject decision\\\");\\n            }\\n            record.markManualDecision(adminId, ModerationDecision.REJECTED, reason);\\n            review.reject(reason);\\n        }\\n        moderationRecordRepository.save(record);\\n        reviewRepository.save(review);\\n\\n        return new ModerationResponse(review.getId(), review.getStatus(), record.getDecidedAt());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public Page<AdminReviewResponse> listAdminQueue(\\n        ReviewStatus status,\\n        Long eventId,\\n        Instant submittedAfter,\\n        Pageable pageable\\n    ) {\\n        Page<Review> reviews;\\n        if (eventId != null && submittedAfter != null) {\\n            reviews = reviewRepository.findByStatusAndEventIdAndSubmittedAtGreaterThanEqualOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(\\n                status,\\n                eventId,\\n                submittedAfter,\\n                pageable\\n            );\\n        } else if (eventId != null) {\\n            reviews = reviewRepository.findByStatusAndEventIdOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(status, eventId, pageable);\\n        } else if (submittedAfter != null) {\\n            reviews = reviewRepository.findByStatusAndSubmittedAtGreaterThanEqualOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(status, submittedAfter, pageable);\\n        } else {\\n            reviews = reviewRepository.findByStatusOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(status, pageable);\\n        }\\n\\n        return reviews.map(review -> {\\n            int attempts = moderationRecordRepository.countByReviewAndMethod(review, ModerationMethod.AUTO);\\n            ModerationRecord lastAuto = moderationRecordRepository.findTopByReviewAndMethodOrderByCreatedAtDesc(review, ModerationMethod.AUTO)\\n                .orElse(null);\\n            return reviewMapper.toAdminReviewResponse(review, attempts, reviewMapper.resolveLastAutoDecision(lastAuto));\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    @Scheduled(fixedDelay = 30_000)\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void retryPendingModerations() {\\n        List<ModerationRecord> pending = moderationRecordRepository.findByDecisionAndRetryAfterLessThanEqualAndAutoRetryCountLessThan(\\n            ModerationDecision.PENDING,\\n            Instant.now(),\\n            3\\n        );\\n\\n        int processed = 0;\\n        for (ModerationRecord record : pending) {\\n            try {\\n                processAutoModeration(record);\\n                processed++;\\n            } catch (Exception ex) {\\n                log.error(\\\"Failed moderation retry. moderationRecordId={} reviewId={}\\\", record.getId(), record.getReview().getId(), ex);\\n            }\\n        }\\n        if (processed > 0) {\\n            log.info(\\\"Processed {} moderation retries\\\", processed);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private void processAutoModeration(ModerationRecord record) {\\n        Review review = record.getReview();\\n        if (review.getStatus() != ReviewStatus.PENDING_MODERATION) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        try {\\n            OpenAiModerationService.ModerationResult result = openAiModerationService.moderate(record.getInputText());\\n            String flags = String.join(\\\",\\\", result.flaggedCategories());\\n            String scoresJson = toJson(result.categoryScores());\\n            if (!result.flagged()) {\\n                record.markApproved(flags, scoresJson);\\n                review.approve();\\n                review.publish();\\n                eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ReviewPublishedEvent(review.getId(), review.getEventId(), review.getRating()));\\n                autoApprovedCounter.increment();\\n            } else {\\n                String topCategory = result.flaggedCategories().isEmpty() ? \\\"content_policy_violation\\\" : result.flaggedCategories().get(0);\\n                record.markRejected(flags, scoresJson, topCategory);\\n                review.reject(topCategory);\\n                autoRejectedCounter.increment();\\n            }\\n            moderationRecordRepository.save(record);\\n            reviewRepository.save(review);\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            scheduleRetry(record, review.getId(), ex);\\n            moderationRecordRepository.save(record);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private void scheduleRetry(ModerationRecord record, Long reviewId, Exception ex) {\\n        if (record.getAutoRetryCount() >= 2) {\\n            record.markRetryExhausted();\\n            autoExhaustedCounter.increment();\\n            log.error(\\\"Auto moderation retries exhausted. reviewId={}\\\", reviewId, ex);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        int nextAttempt = record.getAutoRetryCount() + 1;\\n        Instant retryAt;\\n        if (nextAttempt == 1) {\\n            retryAt = Instant.now().plusSeconds(30);\\n        } else if (nextAttempt == 2) {\\n            retryAt = Instant.now().plusSeconds(120);\\n        } else {\\n            retryAt = Instant.now().plusSeconds(600);\\n        }\\n        record.markRetryScheduled(retryAt);\\n        log.warn(\\\"Auto moderation failed. reviewId={} retryAttempt={} retryAfter={}\\\", reviewId, nextAttempt, retryAt, ex);\\n    }\\n\\n    private String toJson(Object value) {\\n        try {\\n            return objectMapper.writeValueAsString(value);\\n        } catch (JsonProcessingException ex) {\\n            return \\\"{}\\\";\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > engagement/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/engagement/service/ReviewService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.engagement.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.api.dto.request.ReviewSubmitRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.api.dto.response.ReviewResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.api.dto.response.ReviewSubmitResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.Review;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.enums.AttendanceVerificationStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.domain.enums.ReviewStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.event.published.ModerationRequiredEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.exception.InvalidRatingException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.exception.ReviewAlreadySubmittedException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.mapper.ReviewMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.engagement.repository.ReviewRepository;\\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class ReviewService {\\n\\n    private final ReviewRepository reviewRepository;\\n    private final ReviewEligibilityService reviewEligibilityService;\\n    private final AttendanceVerificationService attendanceVerificationService;\\n    private final ReviewMapper reviewMapper;\\n    private final IdentityLookupService identityLookupService;\\n    private final EventMetadataLookupService eventMetadataLookupService;\\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\\n\\n    public ReviewService(\\n        ReviewRepository reviewRepository,\\n        ReviewEligibilityService reviewEligibilityService,\\n        AttendanceVerificationService attendanceVerificationService,\\n        ReviewMapper reviewMapper,\\n        IdentityLookupService identityLookupService,\\n        EventMetadataLookupService eventMetadataLookupService,\\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\\n    ) {\\n        this.reviewRepository = reviewRepository;\\n        this.reviewEligibilityService = reviewEligibilityService;\\n        this.attendanceVerificationService = attendanceVerificationService;\\n        this.reviewMapper = reviewMapper;\\n        this.identityLookupService = identityLookupService;\\n        this.eventMetadataLookupService = eventMetadataLookupService;\\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public ReviewSubmitResponse submitReview(Long userId, ReviewSubmitRequest request) {\\n        if (request.rating() == null || request.rating() < 1 || request.rating() > 5) {\\n            throw new InvalidRatingException();\\n        }\\n\\n        reviewEligibilityService.validateEligibility(userId, request.eventId());\\n\\n        if (reviewRepository.existsByUserIdAndEventId(userId, request.eventId())) {\\n            throw new ReviewAlreadySubmittedException();\\n        }\\n\\n        AttendanceVerificationStatus attendanceStatus = attendanceVerificationService.verify(userId, request.eventId());\\n\\n        Review review = new Review(\\n            userId,\\n            request.eventId(),\\n            request.rating(),\\n            request.title(),\\n            request.body(),\\n            attendanceStatus\\n        );\\n        review.markPendingModeration();\\n        Review saved = reviewRepository.save(review);\\n\\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ModerationRequiredEvent(saved.getId()));\\n        return new ReviewSubmitResponse(saved.getId(), saved.getStatus(), \\\"Your review has been submitted and is under moderation.\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public Page<ReviewResponse> listPublishedReviews(Long eventId, Pageable pageable) {\\n        eventMetadataLookupService.getRequiredEventMetadata(eventId);\\n        Page<Review> page = reviewRepository.findByEventIdAndStatusOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(eventId, ReviewStatus.PUBLISHED, pageable);\\n        return page.map(review -> reviewMapper.toReviewResponse(review, identityLookupService.getDisplayName(review.getUserId())));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public Page<ReviewResponse> listMyReviews(Long userId, Pageable pageable) {\\n        return reviewRepository.findByUserIdOrderBySubmittedAtDesc(userId, pageable)\\n            .map(review -> reviewMapper.toReviewResponse(review, identityLookupService.getDisplayName(review.getUserId())));\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:36:53.202Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/openai/config/OpenAiProperties.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.openai.config;\\n\\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.ConfigurationProperties;\\n\\n@ConfigurationProperties(prefix = \\\"openai\\\")\\npublic class OpenAiProperties {\\n\\n    private String baseUrl = \\\"https://api.openai.com\\\";\\n    private String apiKey = \\\"\\\";\\n    private String moderationModel = \\\"omni-moderation-latest\\\";\\n\\n    public String getBaseUrl() {\\n        return baseUrl;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void setBaseUrl(String baseUrl) {\\n        this.baseUrl = baseUrl;\\n    }\\n\\n    public String getApiKey() {\\n        return apiKey;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void setApiKey(String apiKey) {\\n        this.apiKey = apiKey;\\n    }\\n\\n    public String getModerationModel() {\\n        return moderationModel;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void setModerationModel(String moderationModel) {\\n        this.moderationModel = moderationModel;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/openai/config/OpenAiConfig.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.openai.config;\\n\\nimport org.springframework.boot.context.properties.EnableConfigurationProperties;\\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpHeaders;\\nimport org.springframework.http.MediaType;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\\n\\n@Configuration\\n@EnableConfigurationProperties(OpenAiProperties.class)\\npublic class OpenAiConfig {\\n\\n    @Bean(name = \\\"openAiRestClient\\\")\\n    public RestClient openAiRestClient(OpenAiProperties properties, RestClient.Builder builder) {\\n        return builder\\n            .baseUrl(properties.getBaseUrl())\\n            .defaultHeader(HttpHeaders.AUTHORIZATION, \\\"Bearer \\\" + properties.getApiKey())\\n            .defaultHeader(HttpHeaders.CONTENT_TYPE, MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)\\n            .defaultHeader(HttpHeaders.ACCEPT, MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)\\n            .build();\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/openai/dto/OpenAiModerationResponse.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.openai.dto;\\n\\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnoreProperties;\\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\n\\n@JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\\npublic record OpenAiModerationResponse(List<Result> results) {\\n\\n    @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\\n    public record Result(\\n        boolean flagged,\\n        Map<String, Boolean> categories,\\n        @JsonProperty(\\\"category_scores\\\") Map<String, Double> categoryScores\\n    ) {\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/openai/service/OpenAiModerationService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.openai.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.openai.config.OpenAiProperties;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.openai.dto.OpenAiModerationResponse;\\nimport java.util.ArrayList;\\nimport java.util.LinkedHashMap;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Qualifier;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatusCode;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class OpenAiModerationService {\\n\\n    private final RestClient restClient;\\n    private final OpenAiProperties properties;\\n\\n    public OpenAiModerationService(@Qualifier(\\\"openAiRestClient\\\") RestClient restClient, OpenAiProperties properties) {\\n        this.restClient = restClient;\\n        this.properties = properties;\\n    }\\n\\n    public ModerationResult moderate(String inputText) {\\n        OpenAiModerationResponse response = restClient.post()\\n            .uri(\\\"/v1/moderations\\\")\\n            .body(Map.of(\\n                \\\"model\\\", properties.getModerationModel(),\\n                \\\"input\\\", inputText\\n            ))\\n            .retrieve()\\n            .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, res) -> {\\n                throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"OpenAI moderation failed with status \\\" + res.getStatusCode());\\n            })\\n            .body(OpenAiModerationResponse.class);\\n\\n        if (response == null || response.results() == null || response.results().isEmpty()) {\\n            throw new IllegalStateException(\\\"OpenAI moderation returned no results\\\");\\n        }\\n\\n        OpenAiModerationResponse.Result result = response.results().get(0);\\n        Map<String, Double> scores = result.categoryScores() == null ? Map.of() : result.categoryScores();\\n        List<String> flagged = new ArrayList<>();\\n\\n        if (result.categories() != null) {\\n            result.categories().forEach((category, isFlagged) -> {\\n                if (Boolean.TRUE.equals(isFlagged)) {\\n                    flagged.add(category);\\n                }\\n            });\\n        }\\n\\n        return new ModerationResult(result.flagged(), flagged, new LinkedHashMap<>(scores));\\n    }\\n\\n    public record ModerationResult(boolean flagged, List<String> flaggedCategories, Map<String, Double> categoryScores) {\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_7DeusK46SRa0ndbUa55TEnXb"
  }
}

Map.of() : result.categoryScores();\\n        List<String> flagged = new ArrayList<>();\\n\\n        if (result.categories() != null) {\\n            result.categories().forEach((category, isFlagged) -> {\\n                if (Boolean.TRUE.equals(isFlagged)) {\\n                    flagged.add(category);\\n                }\\n            });\\n        }\\n\\n        return new ModerationResult(result.flagged(), flagged, new LinkedHashMap<>(scores));\\n    }\\n\\n    public record ModerationResult(boolean flagged, List<String> flaggedCategories, Map<String, Double> categoryScores) {\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_7DeusK46SRa0ndbUa55TEnXb"
  }
}
```

com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;\\n\\n@JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\\npublic record EbAttendeeResponse(\\n    String id,\\n    boolean cancelled,\\n    boolean refunded,\\n    Profile profile\\n) {\\n    @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\\n    public record Profile(\\n        String email,\\n        @JsonProperty(\\\"name\\\") String fullName\\n    ) {\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/EbAttendeeService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbAttendeeResponse;\\nimport java.util.List;\\n\\npublic interface EbAttendeeService {\\n\\n    List<EbAttendeeResponse> getAttendeesByEvent(String orgToken, String eventId);\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/DefaultEbAttendeeService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.response.EbAttendeeResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnoreProperties;\\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Qualifier;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpHeaders;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatusCode;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class DefaultEbAttendeeService implements EbAttendeeService {\\n\\n    private final RestClient client;\\n\\n    public DefaultEbAttendeeService(@Qualifier(\\\"ebRestClient\\\") RestClient client) {\\n        this.client = client;\\n    }\\n\\n    @JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)\\n    private record AttendeeListResponse(@JsonProperty(\\\"attendees\\\") List<EbAttendeeResponse> attendees) {\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    public List<EbAttendeeResponse> getAttendeesByEvent(String orgToken, String eventId) {\\n        try {\\n            AttendeeListResponse response = client.get()\\n                .uri(\\\"/v3/events/{eventId}/attendees/\\\", eventId)\\n                .header(HttpHeaders.AUTHORIZATION, \\\"Bearer \\\" + orgToken)\\n                .retrieve()\\n                .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (req, resp2) -> {\\n                    throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"EB getAttendeesByEvent failed: \\\" + resp2.getStatusCode());\\n                })\\n                .body(AttendeeListResponse.class);\\n            return response == null || response.attendees() == null ? List.of() : response.attendees();\\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\\n            throw ex;\\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\\n            throw new EbIntegrationException(\\\"EB getAttendeesByEvent error: \\\" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

  }
}

  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:37:48.905Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"mkdir -p payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/api/internal && cat > payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/api/internal/InternalBookingController.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.internal;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service.InternalBookingQueryService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service.InternalBookingQueryService.InternalBookingResponse;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\\n\\n@RestController\\n@RequestMapping(\\\"/internal/payments/bookings\\\")\\npublic class InternalBookingController {\\n\\n    private final InternalBookingQueryService internalBookingQueryService;\\n\\n    public InternalBookingController(InternalBookingQueryService internalBookingQueryService) {\\n        this.internalBookingQueryService = internalBookingQueryService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/by-user-event\\\")\\n    public InternalBookingResponse byUserEvent(@RequestParam Long userId, @RequestParam Long eventId) {\\n        return internalBookingQueryService.getByUserEvent(userId, eventId);\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/{bookingId}\\\")\\n    public InternalBookingResponse byId(@PathVariable Long bookingId) {\\n        return internalBookingQueryService.getByBookingId(bookingId);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/InternalBookingQueryService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Booking;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.BookingNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class InternalBookingQueryService {\\n\\n    private final BookingRepository bookingRepository;\\n\\n    public InternalBookingQueryService(BookingRepository bookingRepository) {\\n        this.bookingRepository = bookingRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public InternalBookingResponse getByUserEvent(Long userId, Long eventId) {\\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findTopByUserIdAndEventIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc(userId, eventId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(\\\"userId=\\\" + userId + \\\", eventId=\\\" + eventId));\\n        return toResponse(booking);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public InternalBookingResponse getByBookingId(Long bookingId) {\\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(bookingId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingId));\\n        return toResponse(booking);\\n    }\\n\\n    private InternalBookingResponse toResponse(Booking booking) {\\n        return new InternalBookingResponse(\\n            booking.getId(),\\n            booking.getUserId(),\\n            booking.getEventId(),\\n            booking.getSlotId(),\\n            booking.getOrgId(),\\n            booking.getStatus().name()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    public record InternalBookingResponse(\\n        Long bookingId,\\n        Long userId,\\n        Long eventId,\\n        Long slotId,\\n        Long orgId,\\n        String status\\n    ) {\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_VjYDSmHF9SBbj7KWgsHYJwKa"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:37:54.954Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_l1rWt0mN56AWtVUUH5hixwBH",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/InternalBookingQueryService.java\n@@\n     @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n     public InternalBookingResponse getByUserEvent(Long userId, Long eventId) {\n         Booking booking = bookingRepository.findTopByUserIdAndEventIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc(userId, eventId)\n-            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(\"userId=\" + userId + \", eventId=\" + eventId));\n+            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(-1L));\n         return toResponse(booking);\n     }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 523
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:38:15.027Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:38:15.027Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"mkdir -p identity/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/identity/api/internal && cat > identity/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/identity/api/internal/InternalIdentityController.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.identity.api.internal;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.service.InternalIdentityQueryService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.service.InternalIdentityQueryService.DisplayNameResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.service.InternalIdentityQueryService.EmailResponse;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\\n\\n@RestController\\n@RequestMapping(\\\"/internal/identity/users\\\")\\npublic class InternalIdentityController {\\n\\n    private final InternalIdentityQueryService internalIdentityQueryService;\\n\\n    public InternalIdentityController(InternalIdentityQueryService internalIdentityQueryService) {\\n        this.internalIdentityQueryService = internalIdentityQueryService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/{userId}/display-name\\\")\\n    public DisplayNameResponse displayName(@PathVariable Long userId) {\\n        return internalIdentityQueryService.getDisplayName(userId);\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/{userId}/email\\\")\\n    public EmailResponse email(@PathVariable Long userId) {\\n        return internalIdentityQueryService.getEmail(userId);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > identity/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/identity/service/InternalIdentityQueryService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.identity.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.domain.User;\\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.exception.UserNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.repository.UserRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.identity.repository.UserSettingsRepository;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class InternalIdentityQueryService {\\n\\n    private final UserRepository userRepository;\\n    private final UserSettingsRepository userSettingsRepository;\\n\\n    public InternalIdentityQueryService(UserRepository userRepository, UserSettingsRepository userSettingsRepository) {\\n        this.userRepository = userRepository;\\n        this.userSettingsRepository = userSettingsRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public DisplayNameResponse getDisplayName(Long userId) {\\n        User user = userRepository.findById(userId).orElseThrow(() -> new UserNotFoundException(userId));\\n        Optional<String> fullName = userSettingsRepository.findFullNameByUserId(userId);\\n        String displayName = fullName.filter(name -> !name.isBlank())\\n            .orElseGet(() -> user.getEmail() == null ? \\\"Anonymous\\\" : user.getEmail().split(\\\"@\\\")[0]);\\n        return new DisplayNameResponse(userId, displayName);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public EmailResponse getEmail(Long userId) {\\n        User user = userRepository.findById(userId).orElseThrow(() -> new UserNotFoundException(userId));\\n        return new EmailResponse(userId, user.getEmail());\\n    }\\n\\n    public record DisplayNameResponse(Long userId, String displayName) {\\n    }\\n\\n    public record EmailResponse(Long userId, String email) {\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_yD2VIfi8GRoJfSH5c2R1Eq8M"
  }
}

## Entry 533
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:38:31.815Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:38:31.815Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"mkdir -p discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/api/internal discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/service/internal && cat > discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/api/internal/InternalCatalogController.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.internal;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.internal.InternalCatalogQueryService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.internal.InternalCatalogQueryService.EventEbMetadataResponse;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\\n\\n@RestController\\n@RequestMapping(\\\"/internal/catalog/events\\\")\\npublic class InternalCatalogController {\\n\\n    private final InternalCatalogQueryService internalCatalogQueryService;\\n\\n    public InternalCatalogController(InternalCatalogQueryService internalCatalogQueryService) {\\n        this.internalCatalogQueryService = internalCatalogQueryService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/{eventId}/eb-metadata\\\")\\n    public EventEbMetadataResponse eventMetadata(@PathVariable Long eventId) {\\n        return internalCatalogQueryService.getEventEbMetadata(eventId);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/service/internal/InternalCatalogQueryService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.internal;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.EventCatalogItem;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.EventCatalogRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.ResourceNotFoundException;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class InternalCatalogQueryService {\\n\\n    private final EventCatalogRepository eventCatalogRepository;\\n\\n    public InternalCatalogQueryService(EventCatalogRepository eventCatalogRepository) {\\n        this.eventCatalogRepository = eventCatalogRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public EventEbMetadataResponse getEventEbMetadata(Long eventId) {\\n        EventCatalogItem item = eventCatalogRepository.findById(eventId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new ResourceNotFoundException(\\\"Event not found: \\\" + eventId, \\\"EVENT_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n        return new EventEbMetadataResponse(item.getId(), item.getOrganizationId(), item.getEventbriteEventId());\\n    }\\n\\n    public record EventEbMetadataResponse(Long eventId, Long orgId, String ebEventId) {\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_BZoZwPH5klq4n7gnFNAXLNhO"
  }
}
```

org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\\n\\n@RestController\\n@RequestMapping(\\\"/internal/catalog/events\\\")\\npublic class InternalCatalogController {\\n\\n    private final InternalCatalogQueryService internalCatalogQueryService;\\n\\n    public InternalCatalogController(InternalCatalogQueryService internalCatalogQueryService) {\\n        this.internalCatalogQueryService = internalCatalogQueryService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @GetMapping(\\\"/{eventId}/eb-metadata\\\")\\n    public EventEbMetadataResponse eventMetadata(@PathVariable Long eventId) {\\n        return internalCatalogQueryService.getEventEbMetadata(eventId);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/service/internal/InternalCatalogQueryService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.internal;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.EventCatalogItem;\\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.EventCatalogRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.ResourceNotFoundException;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class InternalCatalogQueryService {\\n\\n    private final EventCatalogRepository eventCatalogRepository;\\n\\n    public InternalCatalogQueryService(EventCatalogRepository eventCatalogRepository) {\\n        this.eventCatalogRepository = eventCatalogRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public EventEbMetadataResponse getEventEbMetadata(Long eventId) {\\n        EventCatalogItem item = eventCatalogRepository.findById(eventId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new ResourceNotFoundException(\\\"Event not found: \\\" + eventId, \\\"EVENT_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n        return new EventEbMetadataResponse(item.getId(), item.getOrganizationId(), item.getEventbriteEventId());\\n    }\\n\\n    public record EventEbMetadataResponse(Long eventId, Long orgId, String ebEventId) {\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:38:53.728Z

**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:38:53.728Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V38__create_review_eligibility_table.sql <<'EOF'\\nCREATE TABLE review_eligibility (\\n    id                  BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n    user_id             BIGINT      NOT NULL,\\n    event_id            BIGINT      NOT NULL,\\n    slot_id             BIGINT,\\n    booking_id          BIGINT,\\n    status              VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UNLOCKED',\\n    eligible_until      TIMESTAMP,\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMP   NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMP   NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT uq_review_eligibility_user_event UNIQUE (user_id, event_id),\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_review_eligibility_status CHECK (status IN ('UNLOCKED', 'REVOKED', 'EXPIRED'))\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_review_eligibility_status ON review_eligibility (status);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_review_eligibility_booking ON review_eligibility (booking_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_review_eligibility_user ON review_eligibility (user_id);\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V39__create_reviews_table.sql <<'EOF'\\nCREATE TABLE reviews (\\n    id                              BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n    user_id                         BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    event_id                        BIGINT        NOT NULL,\\n    rating                          SMALLINT      NOT NULL,\\n    title                           VARCHAR(100)  NOT NULL,\\n    body                            VARCHAR(2000) NOT NULL,\\n    status                          VARCHAR(30)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SUBMITTED',\\n    attendance_verification_status  VARCHAR(40)   NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ATTENDANCE_SELF_REPORTED',\\n    rejection_reason                VARCHAR(255),\\n    published_at                    TIMESTAMP,\\n    submitted_at                    TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    created_at                      TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    updated_at                      TIMESTAMP     NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT uq_reviews_user_event UNIQUE (user_id, event_id),\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_reviews_rating CHECK (rating >= 1 AND rating <= 5),\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_reviews_status CHECK (status IN ('SUBMITTED', 'PENDING_MODERATION', 'APPROVED', 'PUBLISHED', 'REJECTED')),\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_reviews_attendance_status CHECK (\\n        attendance_verification_status IN ('EB_VERIFIED', 'ATTENDANCE_SELF_REPORTED', 'ATTENDANCE_EB_UNAVAILABLE')\\n    )\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_reviews_event_status ON reviews (event_id, status);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_reviews_user_id ON reviews (user_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_reviews_status ON reviews (status);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_reviews_event_rating ON reviews (event_id, rating) WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED';\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V40__create_moderation_records_table.sql <<'EOF'\\nCREATE TABLE moderation_records (\\n    id                  BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n    review_id           BIGINT      NOT NULL REFERENCES reviews(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\n    method              VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,\\n    input_text          TEXT        NOT NULL,\\n    decision            VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',\\n    flags               VARCHAR(500),\\n    scores_json         TEXT,\\n    moderator_id        BIGINT,\\n    reason              VARCHAR(500),\\n    auto_retry_count    INT         NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\\n    retry_after         TIMESTAMP,\\n    decided_at          TIMESTAMP,\\n    created_at          TIMESTAMP   NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n    updated_at          TIMESTAMP   NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),\\n\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_moderation_method CHECK (method IN ('AUTO', 'MANUAL')),\\n    CONSTRAINT chk_moderation_decision CHECK (decision IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED', 'PENDING'))\\n);\\n\\nCREATE INDEX idx_moderation_review_id ON moderation_records (review_id);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_moderation_retry_after ON moderation_records (retry_after)\\n    WHERE decision = 'PENDING' AND retry_after IS NOT NULL;\\nCREATE INDEX idx_moderation_method_decision ON moderation_records (method, decision);\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_J2BxvQk5qo4C6VZVLsh8ex6T"
  }
}
```

## Entry 558
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:39:23.629Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:39:23.629Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_kvuJXh9c7u49XmZnvllIfWse",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: engagement/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/engagement/api/controller/ReviewController.java\n@@\n import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\n import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;\n+import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort;\n import org.springframework.data.web.PageableDefault;\n@@\n     public Page<ReviewResponse> listPublished(\n         @PathVariable Long eventId,\n-        @PageableDefault(size = 20, sort = \"submittedAt\") Pageable pageable\n+        @PageableDefault(size = 20, sort = \"submittedAt\", direction = Sort.Direction.DESC) Pageable pageable\n     ) {\n         return reviewService.listPublishedReviews(eventId, pageable);\n     }\n@@\n     @GetMapping(\"/me\")\n     @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.USER + \"')\")\n-    public Page<ReviewResponse> myReviews(Authentication authentication, @PageableDefault(size = 20, sort = \"submittedAt\") Pageable pageable) {\n+    public Page<ReviewResponse> myReviews(\n+        Authentication authentication,\n+        @PageableDefault(size = 20, sort = \"submittedAt\", direction = Sort.Direction.DESC) Pageable pageable\n+    ) {\n         AuthenticatedUser user = (AuthenticatedUser) authentication.getPrincipal();\n         return reviewService.listMyReviews(user.userId(), pageable);\n     }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 590
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:41:13.812Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:41:13.812Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "Implemented FR8 from `POQ/Engagement/SPEC_8.md` as production code (no test cases added), including a new `engagement` module plus required shared/internal integrations.\n\n**What I changed**\n- Added new module and wiring:\n  - [pom.xml](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/pom.xml)\n  - [app/pom.xml](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/pom.xml)\n  - New module: [engagement/pom.xml](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/engagement/pom.xml)\n\n- Implemented FR8 domain + APIs + orchestration in `engagement`:\n  - Entities/enums/repositories for `Review`, `ReviewEligibility`, `ModerationRecord`\n  - User APIs:\n    - `POST /api/v1/engagement/reviews`\n    - `GET /api/v1/engagement/reviews/me`\n    - `GET /api/v1/engagement/reviews/events/{eventId}`\n    - `GET /api/v1/engagement/reviews/events/{eventId}/summary`\n  - Admin APIs:\n    - `GET /api/v1/admin/engagement/reviews`\n    - `PUT /api/v1/admin/engagement/reviews/{reviewId}/moderate`\n  - Booking event listeners (`BookingConfirmedEvent`, `BookingCancelledEvent`) using `@TransactionalEventListener(AFTER_COMMIT)`\n  - Async moderation trigger + scheduled retry worker\n  - Redis-backed summary cache invalidated on `ReviewPublishedEvent`\n\n- Added shared ACL/services required by FR8:\n  - Eventbrite attendee facade:\n    - [EbAttendeeService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/EbAttendeeService.java)\n    - [DefaultEbAttendeeService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/DefaultEbAttendeeService.java)\n  - OpenAI moderation facade:\n    - [OpenAiModerationService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/openai/service/OpenAiModerationService.java)\n\n- Added cross-module internal read endpoints used by engagement:\n  - Payments: `/internal/payments/bookings/by-user-event`, `/internal/payments/bookings/{bookingId}`\n  - Identity: `/internal/identity/users/{userId}/display-name`, `/internal/identity/users/{userId}/email`\n  - Catalog: `/internal/catalog/events/{eventId}/eb-metadata`\n\n- Added migrations:\n  - [V38__create_review_eligibility_table.sql](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V38__create_review_eligibility_table.sql)\n  - [V39__create_reviews_table.sql](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V39__create_reviews_table.sql)\n  - [V40__create_moderation_records_table.sql](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V40__create_moderation_records_table.sql)\n\n- Security/config updates:\n  - Public permit for `GET /api/v1/engagement/reviews/events/**` in [SecurityConfig.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/security/SecurityConfig.java)\n  - Added `openai.*` and `engagement.review.eligibility-window-days` in [application.yaml](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/application.yaml)\n\n**Verification**\n- Ran: `mvn -q -DskipTests compile`\n- Result: compile successful.\n\n**Bugs/Gaps found**\n1. Auto-moderation audit granularity: retries currently update the same `ModerationRecord` instead of creating a new row per retry attempt.\n2. HTTP timeout enforcement: internal identity/catalog/payments and OpenAI/Eventbrite calls currently rely on default client behavior; explicit per-call timeout values from spec are not yet enforced.\n3. Eligibility expiry uses `now + windowDays`; spec suggests `eventDate + windowDays`.\n4. If booking lookup fails during `BookingConfirmedEvent` handling, listener logs and skips; no replay/reconciliation endpoint yet.",
    "phase": "final_answer"
  }
}
```

Entities/enums/repositories for `Review`, `ReviewEligibility`, `ModerationRecord`\n  - User APIs:\n    - `POST /api/v1/engagement/reviews`\n    - `GET /api/v1/engagement/reviews/me`\n    - `GET /api/v1/engagement/reviews/events/{eventId}`\n    - `GET /api/v1/engagement/reviews/events/{eventId}/summary`\n  - Admin APIs:\n    - `GET /api/v1/admin/engagement/reviews`\n    - `PUT /api/v1/admin/engagement/reviews/{reviewId}/moderate`\n  - Booking event listeners (`BookingConfirmedEvent`, `BookingCancelledEvent`) using `@TransactionalEventListener(AFTER_COMMIT)`\n  - Async moderation trigger + scheduled retry worker\n  - Redis-backed summary cache invalidated on `ReviewPublishedEvent`\n\n- Added shared ACL/services required by FR8:\n  - Eventbrite attendee facade:\n    - [EbAttendeeService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/EbAttendeeService.java)\n    - [DefaultEbAttendeeService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/DefaultEbAttendeeService.java)\n  - OpenAI moderation facade:\n    - [OpenAiModerationService.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/openai/service/OpenAiModerationService.java)\n\n- Added cross-module internal read endpoints used by engagement:\n  - Payments: `/internal/payments/bookings/by-user-event`, `/internal/payments/bookings/{bookingId}`\n  - Identity: `/internal/identity/users/{userId}/display-name`, `/internal/identity/users/{userId}/email`\n  - Catalog: `/internal/catalog/events/{eventId}/eb-metadata`\n\n- Added migrations:\n  - [V38__create_review_eligibility_table.sql](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V38__create_review_eligibility_table.sql)\n  - [V39__create_reviews_table.sql](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V39__create_reviews_table.sql)\n  - [V40__create_moderation_records_table.sql](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/db/migration/V40__create_moderation_records_table.sql)\n\n- Security/config updates:\n  - Public permit for `GET /api/v1/engagement/reviews/events/**` in [SecurityConfig.java](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/security/SecurityConfig.java)\n  - Added `openai.*` and `engagement.review.eligibility-window-days` in [application.yaml](/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/app/src/main/resources/application.yaml)\n\n**Verification**\n- Ran: `mvn -q -DskipTests compile`\n- Result: compile successful.\n\n**Bugs/Gaps found**\n1. Auto-moderation audit granularity: retries currently update the same `ModerationRecord` instead of creating a new row per retry attempt.\n2. HTTP timeout enforcement: internal identity/catalog/payments and OpenAI/Eventbrite calls currently rely on default client behavior; explicit per-call timeout values from spec are not yet enforced.\n3. Eligibility expiry uses `now + windowDays`; spec suggests `eventDate + windowDays`.\n4. If booking lookup fails during `BookingConfirmedEvent` handling, listener logs and skips; no replay/reconciliation endpoint yet."
      }
    ],
    "phase": "final_answer"
  }
}
```

## Entry 595
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T22:43:04.399Z
**Role/Type:** turn_context
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T22:43:04.399Z",
  "type": "turn_context",
  "payload": {
    "turn_id": "019cbb04-de4d-7aa3-a764-d981f3f3e5d5",
    "cwd": "/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking",
    "current_date": "2026-03-05",
    "timezone": "Asia/Kolkata",
    "approval_policy": "on-request",
    "sandbox_policy": {
      "type": "workspace-write",
      "network_access": false,
      "exclude_tmpdir_env_var": false,
      "exclude_slash_tmp": false
    },
    "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
    "personality": "pragmatic",
    "collaboration_mode": {
      "mode": "default",
      "settings": {
        "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
        "reasoning_effort": "medium",
        "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\n\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\n\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\n\n## request_user_input availability\n\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\n\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\n"
      }
    },
    "effort": "medium",
    "summary": "none",
    "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md — Reference Index\n\n> Every agent working in this codebase must read the files listed below before producing\n> any output. Each file governs a specific concern. Read the ones that apply to your task.\n\n---\n\n## Reference Files\n\n| File | Governs |\n|---|---|\n| `PRODUCT.md` | The 7 modules, what each one owns, dependency order, inter-module event map, Eventbrite ACL facade names, hard architectural rules, and where new code goes. Read this before touching any module. |\n| `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` | Eventbrite integration architecture: ACL facades, all FR flows (FR1–FR7 implemented), critical constraints (no user creation, no seat locking; single-order cancel/refunds are handled via `StripeRefundService`). Read before designing any Eventbrite-touching feature. |\n| `docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md` | Canonical folder and package layout for every module. The exact location of every layer: `api/controller/`, `api/dto/`, `domain/`, `service/`, `repository/`, `mapper/`, `event/published/`, `event/listener/`, `statemachine/`, `exception/`. Anti-patterns list. Read this before writing any class. |\n| `agents/SPEC_GENERATOR.md` | How to produce a `SPEC.md` for any feature. Eight confirmation-gated stages with module context and Eventbrite constraints built-in. Requirements → Domain Model → Architecture & File Structure → DB Schema → API → Business Logic → Error Handling → Tests. Read this before speccing any feature. |\n| `agents/CODING_AGENT.md` | Spring Boot 3.5.11 / Java 21 coding standards. Domain behaviour, service orchestration, mapper rules, controller rules, event rules, 10 Eventbrite ACL facades, inter-module communication (REST + Spring Events), admin/ special rules, state machine, Spring AI. Read this before writing any production code. |\n| `agents/TEST_AGENT.md` | Test agent responsibilities and best practices. Builds tests from `SPEC_*.md` Stage 8, executes tests, fixes test/code issues caused by behavior mismatches, and writes timestamped logs under `test_result_folder/`. Read this before writing or running tests. |\n| `docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md` | Four-layer test structure: `domain/` (unit), `service/` (Mockito), `api/` (@WebMvcTest), `arch/` (ArchUnit enforcing 10 hard rules + Eventbrite constraints). All rule examples, happy path, negative path, exception patterns. Read before writing any test. |\n| `mock-eventbrite-api/README.md` | **Mock Eventbrite Service:** Python FastAPI in-memory mock of Eventbrite API v3. Used for local development and testing. Exposes all 10 ACL facade endpoints without hitting production Eventbrite. See setup instructions below. |\n\n---\n\n## Module Quick Reference\n\nFull detail for each module is in `PRODUCT.md`. This table is a lookup only.\n\n| Module | Owns | External ACL Facades Used |\n|---|---|---|\n| `discovery-catalog` | Events, Venues, Cities, catalog sync | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbTicketService` |\n| `scheduling` | Show slots, conflict validation | `EbEventSyncService` |\n| `identity` | Users, JWT, profiles, preferences, wallet | — |\n| `booking-inventory` | Seats, SeatMap, Cart, Pricing, Seat Lock State Machine | `EbTicketService` |\n| `payments-ticketing` | Bookings, Payments, E-Tickets, Cancellations, Refunds, Wallet | `StripePaymentService`, `StripeRefundService`, `StripeWebhookHandler` |\n| `promotions` | Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules | `EbDiscountSyncService` |\n| `engagement` | Reviews, Moderation, AI Chatbot (`service/chatbot/`), RAG pipeline | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbAttendeeService` |\n| `admin/` | No domain ownership. Orchestration and aggregation only. | — |\n| `shared/` | All external ACL facades, JWT, base classes, common DTOs, configs | — |\n\n---\n\n## Hard Rules — Never Violate\n\nCanonical numbering and wording are owned by `PRODUCT.md` Section 9. These shorthand rules apply to every task without exception.\n\n1. No module imports another module's `@Service`, `@Entity`, or `@Repository`.\n  - Exception: `admin/` MAY import module `@Service` beans for READ operations only; all writes MUST go through the owning module REST API.\n2. No module calls Eventbrite, Stripe, or OpenAI HTTP directly — only through `shared/` ACL facades.\n3. ACL facade names are exactly as listed below — never invent new ones.\n4. Spring Events carry only primitives, IDs, enums, and value objects — never `@Entity` objects.\n5. One `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/common/exception/` — never `@ControllerAdvice` in a module.\n6. All field mapping goes in `mapper/` using MapStruct — never inside a service or controller.\n7. `admin/` owns no `@Entity` and no database table.\n8. `shared/` has no dependency on any module.\n9. `app/` has zero business logic.\n10. Dependency direction is strictly downward — no circular imports between modules.\n\n---\n\n## Eventbrite ACL Facade Names (HARD RULE #3)\nRead the docs/eventbriteapiv3public.apib for detail API Endpoint with schema, Response, Request and errors\n\nAll 10 facades are in `shared/eventbrite/service/`. These are the ONLY things modules call for Eventbrite:\n\n1. **EbEventSyncService** — Create, update, publish, cancel events; pull org event catalog\n2. **EbVenueService** — Create and update venues; list org venues\n3. **EbScheduleService** — Create recurring event schedules and occurrences\n4. **EbTicketService** — Create/update ticket classes; manage inventory; check availability\n5. **EbCapacityService** — Retrieve and update event capacity tiers\n6. **EbOrderService** — Read orders post-checkout (admin/ reporting only — NOT used in FR5/FR6 payment flows; orders are created internally in `bookings` table when Stripe payment is confirmed)\n7. **EbAttendeeService** — List attendees; verify attendance for reviews (engagement only — FR8 attendance verification)\n8. **EbDiscountSyncService** — Create, update, delete discount codes\n9. **EbRefundService** — INACTIVE for payments — all refunds go through `StripeRefundService`; original EB refund read-only API has no submission endpoint\n10. **EbWebhookService** — Mock/testing only; not used in production registration flow\n\n**See `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` for which module uses which facade and what gaps exist.**\n\n---\n\n## Stripe ACL Facades (payments-ticketing only)\n\nAll 3 facades are in `shared/stripe/service/`. Only `payments-ticketing` calls these:\n\n1. **StripePaymentService** — Create PaymentIntents; confirm and capture payments\n2. **StripeRefundService** — Submit refunds; query refund status\n3. **StripeWebhookHandler** — Verify webhook signatures; parse `payment_intent.succeeded` / `payment_intent.payment_failed` / `charge.refunded` events\n\n**Hard Rule:** Never call `com.stripe.*` SDK classes directly from a module service — always delegate to the facade in `shared/stripe/service/`.\n\n---\n\n## Module Dependency Order (HARD RULE #10)\n\n```\nshared/               <- foundational; no dependencies\n  |\n  v\ndiscovery-catalog    <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nscheduling           <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\nidentity             <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nbooking-inventory    <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\n  |\n  v\npayments-ticketing   <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\npromotions           <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nengagement           <- depends on shared + payments-ticketing + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nadmin/               <- thin orchestration; reads from all, writes via REST APIs\n  |\n  v\napp/                 <- entry point only; zero business logic\n```\n\n**Golden Rule:** Module at level N can depend on level N-1 or lower (or `shared/`) only. Never import from sibling or downstream modules.\n\n**See `PRODUCT.md` Section 2 for detailed rationale.**\n\n\n## Skills\nA skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like \"how do I do X\", \"find a skill for X\", \"is there a skill that can...\", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.     "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md — Reference Index\n\n> Every agent working in this codebase must read the files listed below before producing\n> any output. Each file governs a specific concern. Read the ones that apply to your task.\n\n---\n\n## Reference Files\n\n| File | Governs |\n|---|---|\n| `PRODUCT.md` | The 7 modules, what each one owns, dependency order, inter-module event map, Eventbrite ACL facade names, hard architectural rules, and where new code goes. Read this before touching any module. |\n| `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` | Eventbrite integration architecture: ACL facades, all FR flows (FR1–FR7 implemented), critical constraints (no user creation, no seat locking; single-order cancel/refunds are handled via `StripeRefundService`). Read before designing any Eventbrite-touching feature. |\n| `docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md` | Canonical folder and package layout for every module. The exact location of every layer: `api/controller/`, `api/dto/`, `domain/`, `service/`, `repository/`, `mapper/`, `event/published/`, `event/listener/`, `statemachine/`, `exception/`. Anti-patterns list. Read this before writing any class. |\n| `agents/SPEC_GENERATOR.md` | How to produce a `SPEC.md` for any feature. Eight confirmation-gated stages with module context and Eventbrite constraints built-in. Requirements → Domain Model → Architecture & File Structure → DB Schema → API → Business Logic → Error Handling → Tests. Read this before speccing any feature. |\n| `agents/CODING_AGENT.md` | Spring Boot 3.5.11 / Java 21 coding standards. Domain behaviour, service orchestration, mapper rules, controller rules, event rules, 10 Eventbrite ACL facades, inter-module communication (REST + Spring Events), admin/ special rules, state machine, Spring AI. Read this before writing any production code. |\n| `agents/TEST_AGENT.md` | Test agent responsibilities and best practices. Builds tests from `SPEC_*.md` Stage 8, executes tests, fixes test/code issues caused by behavior mismatches, and writes timestamped logs under `test_result_folder/`. Read this before writing or running tests. |\n| `docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md` | Four-layer test structure: `domain/` (unit), `service/` (Mockito), `api/` (@WebMvcTest), `arch/` (ArchUnit enforcing 10 hard rules + Eventbrite constraints). All rule examples, happy path, negative path, exception patterns. Read before writing any test. |\n| `mock-eventbrite-api/README.md` | **Mock Eventbrite Service:** Python FastAPI in-memory mock of Eventbrite API v3. Used for local development and testing. Exposes all 10 ACL facade endpoints without hitting production Eventbrite. See setup instructions below. |\n\n---\n\n## Module Quick Reference\n\nFull detail for each module is in `PRODUCT.md`. This table is a lookup only.\n\n| Module | Owns | External ACL Facades Used |\n|---|---|---|\n| `discovery-catalog` | Events, Venues, Cities, catalog sync | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbTicketService` |\n| `scheduling` | Show slots, conflict validation | `EbEventSyncService` |\n| `identity` | Users, JWT, profiles, preferences, wallet | — |\n| `booking-inventory` | Seats, SeatMap, Cart, Pricing, Seat Lock State Machine | `EbTicketService` |\n| `payments-ticketing` | Bookings, Payments, E-Tickets, Cancellations, Refunds, Wallet | `StripePaymentService`, `StripeRefundService`, `StripeWebhookHandler` |\n| `promotions` | Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules | `EbDiscountSyncService` |\n| `engagement` | Reviews, Moderation, AI Chatbot (`service/chatbot/`), RAG pipeline | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbAttendeeService` |\n| `admin/` | No domain ownership. Orchestration and aggregation only. | — |\n| `shared/` | All external ACL facades, JWT, base classes, common DTOs, configs | — |\n\n---\n\n## Hard Rules — Never Violate\n\nCanonical numbering and wording are owned by `PRODUCT.md` Section 9. These shorthand rules apply to every task without exception.\n\n1. No module imports another module's `@Service`, `@Entity`, or `@Repository`.\n  - Exception: `admin/` MAY import module `@Service` beans for READ operations only; all writes MUST go through the owning module REST API.\n2. No module calls Eventbrite, Stripe, or OpenAI HTTP directly — only through `shared/` ACL facades.\n3. ACL facade names are exactly as listed below — never invent new ones.\n4. Spring Events carry only primitives, IDs, enums, and value objects — never `@Entity` objects.\n5. One `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/common/exception/` — never `@ControllerAdvice` in a module.\n6. All field mapping goes in `mapper/` using MapStruct — never inside a service or controller.\n7. `admin/` owns no `@Entity` and no database table.\n8. `shared/` has no dependency on any module.\n9. `app/` has zero business logic.\n10. Dependency direction is strictly downward — no circular imports between modules.\n\n---\n\n## Eventbrite ACL Facade Names (HARD RULE #3)\nRead the docs/eventbriteapiv3public.apib for detail API Endpoint with schema, Response, Request and errors\n\nAll 10 facades are in `shared/eventbrite/service/`. These are the ONLY things modules call for Eventbrite:\n\n1. **EbEventSyncService** — Create, update, publish, cancel events; pull org event catalog\n2. **EbVenueService** — Create and update venues; list org venues\n3. **EbScheduleService** — Create recurring event schedules and occurrences\n4. **EbTicketService** — Create/update ticket classes; manage inventory; check availability\n5. **EbCapacityService** — Retrieve and update event capacity tiers\n6. **EbOrderService** — Read orders post-checkout (admin/ reporting only — NOT used in FR5/FR6 payment flows; orders are created internally in `bookings` table when Stripe payment is confirmed)\n7. **EbAttendeeService** — List attendees; verify attendance for reviews (engagement only — FR8 attendance verification)\n8. **EbDiscountSyncService** — Create, update, delete discount codes\n9. **EbRefundService** — INACTIVE for payments — all refunds go through `StripeRefundService`; original EB refund read-only API has no submission endpoint\n10. **EbWebhookService** — Mock/testing only; not used in production registration flow\n\n**See `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` for which module uses which facade and what gaps exist.**\n\n---\n\n## Stripe ACL Facades (payments-ticketing only)\n\nAll 3 facades are in `shared/stripe/service/`. Only `payments-ticketing` calls these:\n\n1. **StripePaymentService** — Create PaymentIntents; confirm and capture payments\n2. **StripeRefundService** — Submit refunds; query refund status\n3. **StripeWebhookHandler** — Verify webhook signatures; parse `payment_intent.succeeded` / `payment_intent.payment_failed` / `charge.refunded` events\n\n**Hard Rule:** Never call `com.stripe.*` SDK classes directly from a module service — always delegate to the facade in `shared/stripe/service/`.\n\n---\n\n## Module Dependency Order (HARD RULE #10)\n\n```\nshared/               <- foundational; no dependencies\n  |\n  v\ndiscovery-catalog    <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nscheduling           <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\nidentity             <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nbooking-inventory    <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\n  |\n  v\npayments-ticketing   <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\npromotions           <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nengagement           <- depends on shared + payments-ticketing + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nadmin/               <- thin orchestration; reads from all, writes via REST APIs\n  |\n  v\napp/                 <- entry point only; zero business logic\n```\n\n**Golden Rule:** Module at level N can depend on level N-1 or lower (or `shared/`) only. Never import from sibling or downstream modules.\n\n**See `PRODUCT.md` Section 2 for detailed rationale.**\n\n\n## Skills\nA skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like \"how do I do X\", \"find a skill for X\", \"is there a skill that can...\", or express interest in extending capabilities.   "payload": {
    "turn_id": "019cbba2-168d-76c3-ac7f-877cae3a49b5",
